name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Election 2020 Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This is an unprecedented time. But with these election adjustments, Hoosier voices will be heard on June 2. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

_**“We will have a safe and secure election.” –Governor Holcomb**_

Governor Holcomb and Secretary of State Connie Lawson announced today new updates the state is making for the June 2 primary – all with the aim of providing for a safe, free and secure election.

Last month, with the support of Governor Holcomb and Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer, as well as the Democrat Party Chair and Secretary Lawson, the Indiana 2020 Primary Election was moved from May 5 to June 2.

Secretary Lawson unveiled a set of additional recommendations she’ll make to the Indiana Election Commission tomorrow:
* _**Early, in-person voting will still occur,**_ although during an abbreviated period.
* Early voting will be available May 26 – June 1.
* Absentee ballots submitted after Dec. 2, 2019 are accepted.
* Secretary Lawson will procure PPE for poll workers in all 92 counties.
* Procurement of this PPE will not impact critical care and other medical supply chains.

Additionally, Indiana has requested $7.9 million from the federal election COVID-19 fund and will use these funds for PPE and cleaning supplies so our primary election can occur in a **s** _**afe and healthy**_ way for all Hoosier voters.

Online recruitment efforts will be used to encourage younger Hoosiers – like our high school and college students – to sign up to be poll workers.

In addition to moving the primary date, absentee voting was expanded to allow _**every Hoosier voter the option to vote with a mail-in absentee ballot**_ for this primary election. Remember – if you’d like to use this voting method, _**you’ll need to request a ballot,**_ and to date, over 70,400 Indiana voters have requested their absentee ballot for the primary.

Two important deadlines to know with the adjustments to the 2020 primary:
* _**May 4 - deadline to register to vote.**_
* _**May 21- deadline to request an absentee ballot. **_

Due to the higher volume of absentee ballots and an expected decrease in the number of poll workers, it might take a little longer before we get back primary results.

This is an unprecedented time. But with these election adjustments, Hoosier voices will be heard on June 2.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---

name: Susan Collins
subject: Sign the Petition: No Time for Partisan Games
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
One month ago today, I proposed to my colleagues an idea to support America's small businesses. Senator Marco Rubio and I got together with a small bipartisan group and worked to pass legislation to support the small employers across the country that have been devastated by this pandemic.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Hi Peter,
One month ago today, I proposed to my colleagues an idea to support America's small businesses.
Senator Marco Rubio and I got together with a small bipartisan group and worked to pass legislation to support the small employers across the country that have been devastated by this pandemic.
**The program has been a big success.**
In the less-than two weeks since the program went live, more than 1.63 million loan applications have been approved, providing $349 billion in assistance to small employers and their workers. These funds are crucial to ensure that hard working Americans continue to get a paycheck even though their businesses have been hard hit by this pandemic.
_In Maine, $2.22 billion has been provided to 16,196 small businesses. These forgivable loans will help these businesses survive and give paychecks to their employees._
One innovation in this program is that self-employed people are eligible for assistance. Plumbers, carpenters, barbers, stylists, electricians and many more are in need of immediate help.
But there is a problem. The program is out of money, and Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have decided to play partisan games with this funding and have **blocked it** from passing.
**It 's outrageous and going to hurt self-employed people and workers at small businesses all across the country.**
[**Sign our petition to demand Chuck Schumer stop holding up this critical small business funding.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
I have spent my entire career fighting for Maine and the small businesses that power our economy. In this critical time, it is imperative we do all we can to help those businesses weather this pandemic.
[**Sign our petition to demand Chuck Schumer stop holding up this critical small business funding.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Small business is the cornerstone of our economy. It is hard working people who are going to lead our economic recovery. We need to support them now.
This shouldn't be about politics--It is time that Washington rise above the partisan fighting and ensure we take care of the small businesses that anchor our economy.
All my best,
Susan Collins
[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIyODQ1MjMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTc4NzI0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Collins for Senator

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Fighting China’s Lies
body:
I have introduced a resolution in Congress to help keep Americans safe and hold China accountable for their disinformation on the COVID-19 pandemic.
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhkkbhy-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkkbhy-kujkulhluu-r/) Friend,I have introduced a resolution in Congress to help keep Americans safe and hold China accountable for their disinformation on the COVID-19 pandemic. [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhkkbhy-kujkulhluu-y/) From the start, China has lied to the world about the origin and dangers of this virus. Instead of taking responsibility, China has spread misinformation and propaganda, sowing confusion and undermining global solidarity.Friend, I am fighting to hold the Chinese Communist government accountable and to prevent future outbreaks. subject: Message of Hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:
Quick Campaign Update
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhkkxll-udthdyhkil-i/)
| | | ☝️☝️ Watch A Quick Message From Tina Ramirez ☝️☝️ Friend, We all know that the Coronavirus situation is affecting everyone in different ways -- some of us more than others, but we have all been impacted. _Personally, I never expected to be running for U.S. Congress in the midst of a global pandemic_ , but -- from schools being closed, events being canceled, and businesses being forced to close -- **life is certainly not what we expected right now**. [**I Understand The Fear, The Uncertainty, And The Frustration We All Feel Right Now -- But We Are All Americans, And We Are In This Together.**](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhkkxll-udthdyhkil-d/) I have traveled to many countries around the world, and _what makes our country so great is the system of government that gives us the freedom to make it on our own, innovate, and find solutions to problems in the midst of a great crisis_. **It’s that same system which allows me, a single mother from Chesterfield, the ability to travel around the world and make a difference** \-- that's how I know we will rally,_just like we always have_ , and _come together to find solutions to this problem and to make our country better_. [__**Because We Always Have.**__](https://tinaramirez.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jhkkxll-udthdyhkil-h/) \-- Tina
---

Sending Pete Sessions back to Washington will simply be handing this seat back to the special interests he represented for much of the last twenty-five years. [I need your help to make sure **_we_** are represented in Washington](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17171194/185121721/-1907457919?refcode=04172020_em_line1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2NmYTg5OC1iNDgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5qZ-HBkiOqW9WcsewwALW9lL7Af7jZrQceU_Ym3cQw=). | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17171195/185121722/1282705599?refcode=04172020_em_button1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2NmYTg5OC1iNDgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5qZ-HBkiOqW9WcsewwALW9lL7Af7jZrQceU_Ym3cQw=)
---
The COVID-19 pandemic is laying bare some of the inherent injustices in our society. Probably most prominent among them is the fact that millions of people who we refuse to pay a living wage, provide access to quality, affordable health care, or even paid sick leave, are now deemed "essential" to our economy. Everyone should be able to pay rent and put food on the table with one job. Everyone should have access to quality, affordable health care. And paid sick leave? It's not just cruel to force people living on the margins to work while sick. As the shutdown of meat processing plants across the nation has shown, it's downright stupid. We simply can't allow a return to the status quo of the last two decades. It's time for change. Pete Sessions will be well funded by those special interests. We need the resources to get our message out. [Let's beat Pete. Show your support with a contribution today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17171196/185121723/-1907457918?refcode=04172020_em_line2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Y2NmYTg5OC1iNDgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5qZ-HBkiOqW9WcsewwALW9lL7Af7jZrQceU_Ym3cQw=). body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17171482/185132041/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2YwN2JlYi1iNzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AyLj5zbe_VH0gzBi3Pz8MFp4w0k3Q09DhHb9J6DyLSU=&emci=7b4570fb-2280-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=67f07beb-b780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9814644) Hey team, I wanted to start out by thanking all of you for your wonderful continued support, even during this challenging time. Thanks to you, we came out of March in good shape. And it’s why I need you on my side now more than ever. Team, this is a people-powered campaign, which means we’re relying on the power of our grassroots donors to help us fight back against the deep pockets of these special interest groups. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, Eugene Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: Eugene DePasquale is running to represent Pennsylvania's 10th Congressional District. name: Corky Messner
subject: Bold action on the WHO
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
President Trump just took bold action against the WHO over boggling the handling of the coronavirus from the start. Read more >>
Peter, President Trump announced on Tuesday, April 14 that he is **halting United States funding of the World Health Organization** pending a review of its response to the coronavirus pandemic. This is a bold action on his part, and I stand by his decision. In a press conference, the President said, “The WHO failed to investigate credible reports from sources in Wuhan that conflicted directly with the Chinese government's official accounts.” He continued, “With the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, we have deep concerns about whether America's generosity has been put to the best use possible. The reality is that the WHO failed to adequately obtain and share information in a timely and transparent fashion ... It could have been contained at its source.” I agree with President Trump that WHO severely mismanaged and covered up the initial outbreak in Wuhan. How many lives were lost because the WHO lied for China? clean_body: President Trump just took bold action against the WHO over boggling the handling of the coronavirus from the start. Read more >> Peter, President Trump announced on Tuesday, April 14 that he is halting United States funding of the World Health Organization pending a review of its response to the coronavirus pandemic. This is a bold action on his part, and I stand by his decision. In a press conference, the President said, “The WHO failed to investigate credible reports from sources in Wuhan that conflicted directly with the Chinese government's official accounts.” He continued, “With the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, we have deep concerns about whether America's generosity has been put to the best use possible. The reality is that the WHO failed to adequately obtain and share information in a timely and transparent fashion ... It could have been contained at its source.” I agree with President Trump that WHO severely mismanaged and covered up the initial outbreak in Wuhan. How many lives were lost because the WHO lied for China? Our great country has been thrown into a state of panic and near economic ruin thanks to the lies told by WHO, and yet Democrats in Congress are still criticizing the president for his decisive action to defund the WHO and put American lives FIRST. That’s why I need your help to defeat Democrat Jeanne Shaheen this November. She is bad for New Hampshire, and she is bad for America. These are trying times for all of us, and I understand some people aren’t in a place to give. Please take care of yourself and your loved ones, and only donate if you are able. But we can’t let these people stay in power. Anyone who is defending the WHO after they failed to investigate credible reports out of Wuhan, that directly conflicted with the Chinese government’s official accounts is not interested in what’s best for our country. It’s time New Hampshire had a real leader, who will actually stand up for the good people of the Granite State and all Americans in Congress. Thanks for your support, Corky | | | ---|--- id:2020-04-13-14:19:44:523t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

\---------- Forwarded message from April 16th, 2020 ----------
Hello —
I never imagined sending another email like this, but our country is facing an unprecedented public health emergency. Our schools, our places of worship, and many businesses are closed as we do our civic duty to slow the outbreak of the coronavirus.
So, I need to be honest with you: just as this pandemic has surely impacted you and your family, it has impacted our campaign, too.
We’ve canceled our in-person fundraisers. Our average online contribution has unsurprisingly dropped in the last month. My whole team is working remotely and we’re overhauling our paid media and organizing plan — just as Mitch McConnell’s super PAC and Republican groups are booking millions of dollars in ads to help our opponent.
This crisis requires a different kind of campaign to flip Colorado’s Senate seat blue — one that none of us could have imagined just a few short months ago. That means messages like this are more important to winning this election than ever before.
We can’t win this election without a lot of folks stepping up for our team in the coming weeks, which is why I’m personally asking:

body:

|

---
**Today is your last chance to help us reach our $25,000 Mid-Month Goal, Peter,** so if you're in a position to donate, please don't wait! The money that we raise right now will directly affect how prepared we are to take on Sen. Cornyn as soon as this runoff is over.

We have to spend money now to ensure that **MJ is the nominee and has a team ready to take on Sen. Cornyn.** He hasn't had to go through a competitive primary or a runoff, and he's been able to save his war chest -- so he'll unleash his millions on MJ during the general election. We need your help to make sure we're ready to take him on, so if you can, **please donate before midnight!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890355/7f51f7bc/4f6e5ed8/4ef11204/2492070491/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMzgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1238&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: Open ACA enrollment.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
An unprecedented health crisis calls for unprecedented action. President Trump has the power to provide millions of recently-uninsured Americans access to health care by re-opening enrollment on HealthCare.gov -- and _yet_ , he chooses not to.
Should the sign-up period be reopened, 3.5 million Americans who have lost their employer-provided insurance due to the economic effects of coronavirus could benefit from quality health care under the Affordable Care Act. Instead, President Trump is twiddling his thumbs.
**That 's why Congresswoman Sanchez is petitioning for the sign-up window to be reopened given the COVID-19 crisis. [Will you stand with her by signing on?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6HzjGJcCvnGrlLZs-E3D-YAh4PXtLurcrzaUkf1-1ME=/ExFecgxpKZpQGAKr_E_ILFtn2Ev0QBvFYTUnwRwbLV8=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6HzjGJcCvnGrlLZs-E3D-YAh4PXtLurcrzaUkf1-1ME=/ExFecgxpKZpQGAKr_E_ILFtn2Ev0QBvFYTUnwRwbLV8=)
In the midst of a global health crisis, access to health care is more crucial than ever. Linda believes that _e_ _very_ American deserves the peace of mind that they are covered by health insurance.
[**Stand with Linda. Stand with the uninsured. | SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6HzjGJcCvnGrlLZs-E3D-YAh4PXtLurcrzaUkf1-1ME=/ExFecgxpKZpQGAKr_E_ILFtn2Ev0QBvFYTUnwRwbLV8=)

Thank you for taking action,
\--_Team S anchez _

| |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17173777/185177019/-779694663?refcode=em041720-header&refcode2=f47e7f31-c980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDdlN2YzMS1jOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4h3UFbd-rMHXVmqE_tP6DZ9s63JjPUaH6VCW8p9Ph0=) **** | | Friends, if you could do more to help our campaign, I urgently ask you to do so. Please give me a moment to explain.

Less than 24 hours after the _Washington Post_ published my comments about Republican Senator David Perdue’s history of corruption and self-dealing, **Donald Trump proved exactly why we need to vote Perdue out.**

**Despite the fact that Perdue and his fellow Republican Senator Kelly Loeffler are implicated in a multimillion dollar insider trading scandal regarding COVID-19 information, Trump just named them to his COVID-19 Congressional Economic Task Force.** Hard to believe, I know. But, we can beat Perdue. As I told the _Washington Post_ :
* * *
_“He really has, his entire professional life, skated on some pretty thin ethical ice,” she said. “And I think it plays into a narrative that makes sense to Georgians.”_
* * *
Like you, friends, Georgians are sick of the corruption and self-dealing. We must retake the U.S. Senate. David Perdue doesn't deserve to serve, and with your help I will defeat him.

I’m the only candidate in this Democratic Primary race who has won an election and who has governed. As a former mayor, public safety director, and head of Homeland Security, I can be ready on Day One. **And as I told the _Washington Post_ :**
* * *
_“We’re going to make political history in Georgia...It’s going to happen this year, and it’s going to happen in November.”_
* * *
**[Friends, I am counting on you to pitch in right now and help me defeat David Perdue in this critically important election. Polling is within the margin of error and I’m rejecting corporate PAC money so I need you with me in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17173779/185177021/-779694663?refcode=em041720-b&refcode2=f47e7f31-c980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDdlN2YzMS1jOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4h3UFbd-rMHXVmqE_tP6DZ9s63JjPUaH6VCW8p9Ph0=)** | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Rik Mehta's ‘N-Word’ Problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
Mehta campaign senior staffer Brandon Kubinak can be seen uttering the racial slur along with his friends... | | | Dear Friend,

The Republican Party of New Jersey has an existential threat if Rikin Mehta is our candidate for U.S. Senate.

A video that has surfaced and was recently sent to the campaign shows a senior staffer, Brandon Kubinak, on the Mehta campaign displaying disgusting racism.

The source stated that this video was presented to Rikin Mehta at the Monmouth County Republican Convention back in early February and the Mehta campaign disregarded it.

This is the type of situation that would not only guarantee we lose the U.S. Senate race, but also lose all down ballot races across the state. This will give the dishonest media their favorite lie as a narrative — that Republicans are racist. We are not, and we must root this out ourselves.

The press release below was sent to media yesterday; all the facts were checked out before we sent this. When BuzzFeed first put out the article on this, it went viral and Brandon Kubinak was kicked out of Monmouth University. The current silence from the media would be shocking only if we disregarded the fact that Rikin Mehta is a sacrificial lamb candidate, propped up by the Progressive wing of the New Jersey establishment to protect Cory Booker. Let’s not fall in their trap.

The Shore News Network also covered the full story [here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=76bf138d11&e=3e017fab0f).

The path to taking control of Congress runs through New Jersey. The path to giving President Trump a super majority in the U.S. Senate does too. The people behind Mehta are the same people that supported John Kasich in 2016.

It seems our video about [Rikin Mehta, a Democrat in disguise](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=09d7c4cee4&e=3e017fab0f), was just the tip of the iceberg.

-Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=f778dd4513&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| April 16th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Rik Mehta's ‘N-Word’ Problem

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Republican candidate for U.S. Senate Hirsh Singh has formally denounced Democrat Rik Mehta for his choice not to fire or otherwise discipline key campaign advisor Brandon Kubinak after he filmed himself using the “n-word,” a derogatory term that denigrates persons of African origin.

In the shocking video, Mehta campaign senior staffer Kubinak can be seen uttering the racial slur along with his friends. Kubinak was eventually expelled from his university for making the video, however Mehta himself seems to have given tacit approval to the video.

Mehta was informed of the video’s existence during the Monmouth County Republican Party Convention in early February, but chose not to fire his staffer after learning of his bigoted behavior.

Kubinak has previously helped Mehta by rigging the Republican Party Convention in Middlesex County, where he plays an important part in the party’s organization. He has attended numerous campaign events with Mehta and has been the brains behind Mehta's policy positions and campaign strategy.

Curiously, Rik Mehta has not come up with a single policy that will benefit the African American community. Rik Mehta's “n-word problem” is an albatross around his neck and he is guaranteed to lose badly should he get the Republican nomination.
The most worrisome part of a Mehta nomination scenario is how it will lead to a wipe-out of the Republican Party in the state, with the GOP losing the Presidential race, every Congressional race, and all down ballot elections.

You can read an article discussing the video [here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=dc47b940c5&e=3e017fab0f), or see the video on Twitter [here](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=3905b00202&e=3e017fab0f).

"The best scenario for the Republican Party would be if Rik Mehta quits the race,” says Singh. “His senior staffer, Brandon Kubinak, should resign all his official positions, including his roles as the Executive Director of the Middlesex County Republican Committee and Chairman of South Amboy's Republican Organization.

“The fact that Mehta is continuing in the race even after his ‘n-word problem’ has come to light is an existential threat for the New Jersey Republican Party."

"We do not need racists to be part of the party; let them go back to wherever they came from, because New Jersey Republicans are not the party of the Ku Klux Klan," added Singh, in an apparent dig at Rik Mehta who was a Democrat until recently and is a known progressive who held a political appointment given to him by the far-left Mayor of Washington D.C., Muriel Bowser.
###
---

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Mary Mancini
subject: TNDP Weekly Recap: We Must Pass Vote By Mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
No person should ever have to choose between the safety of their family and casting their vote. Tennessee Secretary of State Tre Hargett, Governor Bill Lee, and President Donald Trump must create a no-excuse vote by mail system. | | | |
---|---
Dear Peter, It’s been two weeks since you heard from us (hope you and yours had a joyous holiday season) and in these two weeks, as much as things have changed, some things have stayed exactly the same. Democratic lawmakers in Tennessee, who believe in an efficient, smart, and effective government, are fighting for policies to protect lives and serve working families. Republicans, who for 40 years picked up and ran with Reagan's "small government conservative" message have given us a hot mess. With them in charge, the government is not only NOT small, it's ineffective and corrupt, too. More succinctly, Democrats believe in a government whose role it is to protect our freedoms and keep us safe. Republicans? They created what they asked for all those years ago: "Government is not a solution to our problem; government is the problem." This week we also found out definitively that people in Tennessee are testing positive, even though they are asymptomatic, when the Tennessee Department of Corrections tested some employees and found thirteen who tested positive for COVID19. All had no symptoms. This is why everyone must be tested. It's why we can't go back to normal day-to-day unless everyone is tested. Yet, in several press conferences this week, Governor Bill Lee announced his plan to ignore this and all advice from health and science professionals with a plan to reopen the state to normal activity economy May 1. Does he have a plan for how to re-open in 14 days? No. Is there a single health professional on his advisory board? No. Is Governor Lee being transparent about transmission rates? No. We've said it before, and we'll say it again: A dangerous and turbulent time — like the one our country is experiencing right now — is a stark reminder of why we need steady leadership at all levels of government to keep us safe. Leadership that listens to experts, follows the recommendation of scientists, and always prioritizes protecting families and keeping communities safe. Stay safe & stay home, Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
* * *
# SIGN YOUR NAME TO DEMAND
# VOTE BY MAIL
# No Tennessean should ever have to choose between protecting their family or casting their vote. The Tennessee General Assembly had six different opportunities to pass Vote By Mail legislation while passing mandatory laws to recess session during the Coronavirus Pandemic. The Republican supermajority voted it down each time. The Center for Disease Control (CDC) has emphatically stressed social distancing and staying away from crowds of ten or more. Polling places are in direct conflict with CDC recommendations and force voters to choose between staying safe or casting their vote. Tennessee Secretary of State Tre Hargett, Governor Bill Lee, and President Donald Trump must create a no-excuse vote by mail system. **[Sign the petition now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176096/185217389/2131790742?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892)**
* * *
#
# CONVERSATIONS AND QUESTIONS:
# KIRAN SREEPADA
# CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT 7
**[
Join Kiran's Campaign!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176097/185217390/1094501542?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892)** This week we sat down with Kiran Sreepada, candidate for Congressional District 7. Hear first hand the issues Kiran plans to tackle in office, how his service in Federal Government has shaped his values, and what it means to be a mom running for office. [**Watch the video!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176098/185217391/1133886978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892) Conversations and Questions is a weekly happy hour where we sit down with candidates on the 2020 ballot to discuss current issues, their platform, and their campaigns.
* * *
# TNDP TRAINING HUB
# 2020 is a busy year for us all and it became that much more chaotic with Covid-19. Democrats across the state are running impressive hard campaigns. TNDP wanted to support each campaign and offer trainings for your volunteers and staff. We've created **[the TNDP Training Hub to serve as your one stop shop for trainings and skill building. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176099/185217392/262544740?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892)**
* * *
# **TNDP CHAIR, MARY MANCINI, JOINS**
# **STATE DEMOCRATIC PARTY LEADERS IN**
# **URGING FOR VOTE BY MAIL**
"Action to safeguard our electoral system cannot wait. In a matter of weeks, millions of Americans across several states will be asked to vote in municipal and primary elections, and they deserve better than the impossible choice between preserving their well-being and casting their ballots." TNDP chair, Mary Mancini, joined other state party chairs in writing a letter urging election commissions and governments to adopt a vote by mail system. [Read the full letter. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176100/185217393/1374453084?fbclid=IwAR1m4cv575a1MXPT6S5NbM7psBSzfAA-dP9NV9vwdb4Kuy4AsGE81ut60_w&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892)
* * *
# **2020 DEMOCRATIC NATIONAL**
# **CONVENTION MOVED ONE MONTH**
In the midst of this unprecedented health crisis, DNC has moved the 2020 Democratic National Convention back one month, to the week of August 17.
* This change will provide planners with the time to identify the most appropriate structure for this historic event that poses no unnecessary risk to public health.
* As part of their contingency planning efforts, the Democratic National Convention Committee has confirmed that Fiserv Forum, the Wisconsin Center District and hotel accommodations in the surrounding area are available in August.
* The convention planning team will now use the coming weeks to further explore all options to ensure nominating the next president of the United States is done without unnecessary risk to public health. These options include everything from adjusting the convention’s format to crowd size and schedule.

* * *
# NO TIME LIKE THE PRESENT:
# FILL OUT THE US CENCUS
It's a census year, and with more time at home there is ZERO EXCUSE for you to not fill it out. A few quick facts on the importance of the census:
* Congresses uses the data to determine how many Representatives a state gets.
* The federal government uses census numbers to allocate more than $675 billion in federal funds annually for community programs and services, such as education programs, housing and community development, health care services for the elderly and job training.
* State, local and tribal governments use census information for planning and allocating funds for new school construction, libraries, highway safety and public transportation systems, new roads and bridges, location of police and fire departments and many other projects.
* Many 911 emergency systems are based on maps developed for the last census.

[**Fill out the census now! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176101/185217394/-557522054?fbclid=IwAR0Wk8qLRo3AVtfswqkUlz4fllDGge4Qy5JgBsbtnPaQQ8dGZZK_fK5ra4Y&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892)
* * *
# IF YOU DON'T KNOW, NOW YOU KNOW:
# A TNDP PODCAST
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176102/185217395/-6674242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892) This year we head to the ballot box, both locally and nationally. It feels weird to say that given the current state of our country and world, but, elections now are crucial to our economy and health. Use some of your time at home to catch up on some of the biggest stories in Tennessee's legislature. If You Don’t Know, Now You Know: A TNDP Podcast is hosted by Tennessee Democratic Party Chair, Mary Mancini. Recorded live from the Tennessee state capitol in Nashville, we speak with lawmakers, activists, and candidates, people who can tell you – and show you – how the laws are made that affect our lives. There’s no shortage of issues to be covered – about freedom, opportunity, equity, justice, and safety.
**[Listen now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176103/185217396/-6674242?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=&emci=9b523a8a-c780-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=65939972-d980-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6362892) **
* * *
# TWEETS OF THE WEEK
* * *
**DIG2020!** We are trying to raise $10,000 to help fund a new digital program for our candidates. The program will cost in excess of $100k, but an extremely generous donor has agreed to cover the rest if we can raise the first $10k. This program gives our candidates cutting edge data visualization tools, and allows us to provide important insights at the district and precinct levels. With social distancing being the new normal, we are staying ahead of the curve by continuing to offer state of the art digital services to all of our candidates. We understand why some people prefer to give to individual campaigns – but this is an example of how we can come together as a state party to be more efficient and smarter. This is how we can beat Republicans in 2020.

**[Will you help us by making a donation right now - and help us fund this exciting program?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17176104/185217397/-1362459248?emci=5472b271-f77f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=b8af9119-f87f-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6300233&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTkzOTk3Mi1kOTgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=44yIsHQTdd9cf8NUrFE3sOtFTTmIaXTaQqFBBO1pnF8=)** November is coming quickly, and it is more important than ever to come together and mobilize as Democrats. We’re all in this together!
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 200 Days!
body:
I wanted to share the great news! We’ve just outraised my opponent, Lazy Lois Frankel for a THIRD time!
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959934-e6a6b8b768-991fcc90a1)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959933-45b3e38b84-991fcc90a1) I wanted to share the great news!

We’ve just outraised my opponent, Lazy Lois Frankel for a THIRD time!

Not only that, but **we CRUSHED her and raised 2.5 TIMES more than her!**

Frankel has no campaign infrastructure, no community support and since I’ve called her out as being one of the most ineffective leaders, she’s scrambling to prove she offers value beyond the special interests who fund her.

**BUT, she’s still sitting on $1.2 million in cash and by the end of the new quarter, my goal is to totally eliminate her cash advantage.**

[**Help me do that today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959933-45b3e38b84-991fcc90a1)

Since the Coronavirus hit, most campaigns are struggling – and I can understand that.

If you’re able, still generating income for yourself and your family and have funds to contribute, [please make a donation today – if you can, make it a recurring contribution](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959933-45b3e38b84-991fcc90a1).

Lois Frankel is arrogantly sitting back and not even trying to engage voters and the public because in 2018 when she ran for congress **NO ONE RAN AGAINST HER**.

She raised money that year, put it in the bank and collected interest to save for when she had an actual challenger.

That’s what happens when we don’t challenge Democrats with all that we have.

And when Democrats get this comfortable, they do exactly what Lois Frankel is doing . . . working with Nancy Pelosi to stall the reopening of our economy while playing identify politics along the way.

My goal isn’t JUST to beat Lazy Lois . . . I want to divert funds and energy away from the DCCC and DNC so that they spend so much time worrying about me, that they let races around the country slip . . . and we get the House back!

You know I’m the LAST person Pelosi, AOC, Ilhan Omar and Maxine Waters want to see in Congress. And you know they’ll pour in whatever resources they can to defeat me.

**By supporting my race – no matter where in America you live – you’re helping elect Republicans around the nation.**
[**Just help me get to that point by raising as much as we can as fast as we can.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959933-45b3e38b84-991fcc90a1)

Just 200 days remain until the November elections, each day this month, we need to raise $6,000.

[Will you help me hit today’s goal?](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959933-45b3e38b84-991fcc90a1)

[ANY amount helps and if you can make a monthly recurring gift of $30 or even $40, that will get me $1 per day closer to hitting the goal.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-372290-875191-4959933-45b3e38b84-991fcc90a1)

And remember, the more you contribute to my race, the more Pelosi and Democrats will have to shift focus away from other campaigns around the nation.

Thank you again for all that you do and for helping us outraise Lazy Lois Frankel for a THIRD time!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Join me, Zephyr Teachout, and Empire State Indivisible for a Virtual Town Hall
body:
Peter,

I am very excited for this next Virtual Town Hall on Monday evening with Zephyr Teachout, which will be moderated by Empire State Indivisible. Join us as we discuss protecting elections, preserving our democracy during this crisis, and securing the critical relief funding our communities need from Congress. Please forward this opportunity to those in your community who would be interested in these topics and submit questions you have for us in our registration form.

Virtual Town Hall with Adem, Zephyr,

and Empire State Indivisible

To discuss elections and preserving democracy

in the time of COVID-19

Monday, April 20, 2020

7:30-8:30PM EST

Zoom conferencing information will be shared with registered participants.

CLICK HERE TO RSVP https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdMEVa71KNJlVpPayLcLlowxLhF--aySn6AgokC6lZZl548Tw/viewform

Zephyr Teachout is a professor at Fordham Law School, an anti-corruption activist, and the author of Corruption in America and Break 'Em Up. In 2014, she was a candidate for Governor of New York.

We are both looking forward to Empire State Indivisible (ESI) moderating our discussion. ESI is a grassroots activist network dedicated to organizing for progressive change. They are a true partner in the fight for a better political system. I look forward to a meaningful discussion.

I hope you will join us and thank you for your support.

Best,
Adem

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Outlines 3-Phase Approach to ‘Opening Up America Again’ Amid COVID-19
body:
"Based on the latest data, our team of experts now agrees that we can begin the next front in our war." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ead7158c73&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Outlines 3-Phase Approach to ‘Opening Up America Again’ Amid COVID-19**

“President Donald Trump on Thursday announced a cautious, three-phase approach—one that still gives wide latitude to governors—for reopening the shuttered economy in states that have had low rates of transmission of COVID-19,” Fred Lucas reports in _The Daily Signal_.

“Based on the latest data, our team of experts now agrees that we can begin the next front in our war, which we’re calling, ‘Opening up America again,’” the President said.

“We are not opening all at once, but one careful step at a time.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ef19eec512&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “To listen to the critics, the challenge is to choose between lockdowns and sickness. But the real challenge is to consider the whole of America’s health. And that means charting a course that minimizes the suffering caused by the pandemic while avoiding the suffering caused by economic devastation,” Dr. Tim Daughtry writes in [_Townhall_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f0409a84e4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For seven long days, Democrats have been blocking a $250 billion refill for the Paycheck Protection Program, and on Thursday morning the loan fund finally ran out of money . . . The longer Democrats refuse to provide financing for small businesses after government cut off their revenue, the more Americans will have every right to conclude that Mrs. Pelosi and Mr. Schumer are responsible for the worsening economic destruction,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=576e86c58b&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “Globalists are cringing, but Trump is right. The World Health Organization failed–big time–in alerting the world to the seriousness of what began as an isolated outbreak of the new respiratory disease COVID-19 in China,” Rebecca Grant writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e1231eddf4&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b163e36d1&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a44d388e9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=211662d466)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

subject: Invitation for tonight

body:
Tonight at 7 PM Eastern, Mondaire is hosting local community leaders for a virtual town hall to talk about their efforts in the COVID-19 response. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.310/_uC_hrEsRFiYVbfU4MRCrA/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNL3iNtYr2M93i1m9J73r1PfewBNrLzQNZtPquD7Ua-2Bk6TjuLT3Nk94jdBdRRG-2BXHAdWTvHXptrha95SxEyjVEY-2BWziSkWIXVVp0ptmXOGwMrptcXIQLzq7paAt9W3LzgikvRu2BEwfEl5lFpIXgCwxKKJvpCHa6IQK3mga3iRIXTlJJrQ7I03QymuvbRhCXR5NSpSZ8PWokoMnIn0b8axVAe8IksbWStYnzZU7WbPKQuQ-3D-3D/bXNz) Friend, **** **** **** Tonight at 7 PM Eastern, Mondaire is hosting local community leaders for a virtual town hall to talk about their efforts in the COVID-19 response. We’ll be discussing how to support local businesses, feeding those in need, decarceration efforts, how communities are promoting social distancing, and what the federal government is doing and should be doing right now. **_[You can join us through the link here at 7 PM Eastern to learn more and ask any question you have.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/1QA/ni0YAA/t.310/_uC_hrEsRFiYVbfU4MRCrA/h1/OMqVwN4xNkvSR-2FWqj-2FZ30jsxLIea8RcRJW50PtTyn2UyKbkTM29cy0IajyfFrdtocUkU2hAv1ABPdtO-2B0ecgSZKqP96tjhVJespPFlWavf9jT2qTxyjvaBPnNf1-2BgztjRs83LLyRT2aGttdKIzJ-2FgaSKmCTtzsK2HXvOzMg8cVvMRaJqN5nBh3435xL30MfISnyA1Sb6zbmEQo1NHDFxV-2B-2BPE-2FSm-2B0ZbCZiUiikBv92ByPe28NJYssa-2BeyoQMEi1/Y43i)_**
Mondaire will be joined by the following local leaders:

* Mayor Brian Smith, Village of Irvington
* Councilmember Vanessa Agudelo, City of Peekskill
* Beth Davidson, Nyack Center
* Matt Townsend, Spring Valley Collaborative

This crisis has been difficult, but we’re inspired by everyone in our community who is stepping up to help those who need a hand right now. So many people all across the district and all across the country are doing what they can to support their neighbors and their community. Just yesterday, Mondaire spent his morning at the Nyack Center distributing food to public school students in need.

Please join us tonight to learn more about these efforts and how you can get involved!
Thank you, Elyse Schupak, Digital Organizer

subject: We need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/68c23b2b1071c99b/e4ca139d142c2e02c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, As the GOP nominee in the race for Oklahoma’s 1st Congressional District this election cycle, I need your help. It is more important than ever to keep this seat RED and keep the Democrats out of power. **[Will you donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can to our Online Victory Fund now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/68c23b2b1071c99b/23668d42cfd4820ec3d6b838967d376c/34143)** We can’t afford to have one of my liberal opponents funded with outside money come in and “buy” this seat. They won't represent the good people of Oklahoma like I do in Congress. I am not a career politician, and I didn’t go to Washington as a power grab. I went so that I could serve the people of my district, and all Americans.
We’ve seen too many Democrats show their true colors lately, ignoring the needs of their constituents back home over their petty, partisan politics. We are in the middle of a very trying time with the coronavirus pandemic, and Americans are suffering. Yet folks like Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer are actively blocking relief legislation. _Is that what you want for Oklahoma?_ I need your help to build up our Online Victory Fund and keep this seat RED in November. **[Will you click HERE to help me by donating what you can now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/68c23b2b1071c99b/32757af84c0228d0c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** I know these are trying times, and I always want you to put yourself and your loved ones first, and stay healthy and safe. Please only give if you are able at this time. With your help, we’ll win this seat and I’ll continue to put YOU first in Washington. Thanks,
Congressman Kevin Hern [ **Donate NOW >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/68c23b2b1071c99b/b779b56d5abf17bac3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/68c23b2b1071c99b/773110d94be3038ec3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/68c23b2b1071c99b/acaf38a71b963eecc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

subject: Help us turn KS blue!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansas Democratic Party, Gina Long, Treasurer
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cadce5b89c8a/help-us-turn-ks-blue-4805506?e=6fc3a2965d)
---
| |
---
| |
#
The goal of the Kansas Legislative Victory Fund is to elect more commonsense Democratic legislators to both the House and Senate. It's time to put an end to extremist legislation pushed by the Republican majority in both chambers. Kansans deserve a legislature that will deliver good policy to improve their lives, rather than extreme partisanship and gridlock. We only need to flip one seat in the House and three seats in the Senate to break their supermajority and protect Governor Kelly's veto powers. Stand with us to elect Democrats who will work across the aisle to continue moving Kansas forward.

---

Derek --

Even as thousands of American lives have been lost to this deadly virus, President Trump continues to fixate on his own television ratings, while sending mixed messages about whether Americans should stay home to help stop the spread of the coronavirus.

**A president 's first priority is to keep the American people safe, and we need a national stay-at-home order to slow and stop the spread of coronavirus.** The president must act now to save lives and put the health and safety of the American people ahead of politics.

subject: Rick Santorum is on TEAM SCHILLING!
body:

# _**A letter from ****Senator Rick Santorum;**_

04/17/2020

**I’m proud to endorse Bobby Schilling for Congress in the Iowa 2nd District. **I’ve known Bobby for almost a decade now. He is the real deal — a hard-working blue-collar guy who tells it like it is.

Unlike his opponent in this race, _Bobby doesn’t try to have it both ways on the most important issues._ He has ALWAYS been an unapologetic defender of the unborn. He has ALWAYS been a believer in America First and Family First. And he has supported President Trump and his agenda from day one.

Bobby isn’t like most politicians. He thinks like us. He talks like us. He’s the only person running in this race that we can count on to represent working families and working family values — and vote accordingly.

Let’s make sure we pick the right person to beat the radical Left in November. We need a champion of the family and of the working class, and that’s Bobby. **I encourage Iowans in the 2nd District to vote for him on June 2nd.**

Thanks,

**Senator Rick Santorum**

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | **-April 17, 2020-** **-The Election Commission meets to discuss the primary-** **** On Friday, the Election Commission met to discuss voting in the 2020 primary. From the onset, Hoosier Democrats’ position has been to ensure voting is safe, secure and convenient for everyone involved. The agreement the Election Commission reached ensures that local officials have more flexibility in administering the primary election during this unprecedented time. Democrats fought to make sure strong health guidelines were included in the order, as well as working to make it easier to recruit poll workers and expand sites to count absentee ballots with an expected increase in volume. In addition, issues were raised by Democrats at the meeting regarding absentee voting deadlines and mailing an absentee ballot application to voters. Unfortunately, these were voted down by the Republicans on the Commission. But Hoosier Democrats won't give up. We will continue the discussion on why vote-by-mail is the safest option at next week’s April 22 hearing. The good news is, we aren't wasting any time. We've launched a 100%-grassroots-funded, [Vote-by-Mail Outreach Program](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177719/185248574/1745149176?refcode=FFF4.17&amount=21.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=) to make sure Hoosiers know they can vote by mail. But we can't do it without supporters like you helping us get the word out. [Will you give $12 to help voters across our state get access to safe and secure voting by mail?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177720/185248575/-933379051?express_lane=true&amount=%2012&refcode=FFF4.17express_lane_%2012&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=) **-Cases reach new single-day high; testing hits a low point-** **** On Thursday, we reached a record, single-day high of [611 new COVID-19 cases](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177721/185248576/70110383?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535). But this week, [testing dropped again](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177722/185248577/-1054389209?fbclid=IwAR1Wo1k6GKYe5YbOvpefV4Xoe7ow4880O-3FHgnXsVhRzEjDkfBHZn2L1fM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535), hitting numbers similar to where it was when it [first became available](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177723/185248578/-1998961972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) to the general public. As the number of cases rises, Indiana has continued to test well below its capacity. As of Thursday, [Indiana](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177724/185248579/-789619495?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) had conducted less than half the total number of tests [Illinois](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177725/185248580/1475917967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) had done. This is especially problematic in long-term facilities, where healthy people are living in close quarters with COVID-19 patients. [Nursing homes are working blind](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177726/185248581/1125167068?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535), unable to diagnose and separate sick residents from healthy ones. But, Gov. Holcomb has presented zero ideas and no timeline to ramp up testing to save lives. Help us call on Holcomb to step up and get Hoosiers the tests they need. Sign on to the petition _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177727/185248582/511822457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535)**_. **-Rep. Hollingsworth is willing to trade in lives for money-** **** At the height of the coronavirus outbreak, [Trey Hollingsworth](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177728/185248583/-1199071187?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) was quoted saying that the country will have to choose "a loss of American lives" over "a loss of our way of life as Americans." While the Indiana Congressman knows that re-opening the economy would result in the death of countless Americans, he has made it abundantly clear he just doesn’t care. Let’s not mince words, Hollingsworth is an out-of-touch millionaire with more concern for shareholders’ pocketbooks than Hoosiers' lives. We’re calling on Hollingsworth to apologize to the Hoosiers whose lives he devalued and those who have lost loved ones to COVID-19. Join us in demanding an apology _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177729/185248584/-1438512359?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535)**_. **-We’re moving the 2020 State Convention online-** **** On Tuesday, the [Party officially announced](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177730/185248585/-1110569583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=&emci=1cbfb964-ae80-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8a6c1bd5-e680-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=4925535) that it would hold its 2020 State Convention on June 13 with events held virtually and votes cast by mail. The plan to go virtual was unanimously approved by the Party’s State Central Committee. We are confident that this is the safest way to bring Hoosier Democrats from around the state together and maintain a critical element of the electoral process. **-Resources-** **_Need a hand applying to vote by mail?_** Check out the **_[vote-by-mail flowchart](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17177731/185248586/1477133090?type=3&theater&emci=b61971b7-b975-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=4925535&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTZjMWJkNS1lNjgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qV7hRTqyOD5H2R2XVndNS_V1X6f-3n5pL88olVgJYi8=)_** for deadlines and instructions on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot. clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | -April 17, 2020- -The Election Commission meets to discuss the primary- ** On Friday, the Election Commission met to discuss voting in the 2020 primary. From the onset, Hoosier Democrats’ position has been to ensure voting is safe, secure and convenient for everyone involved. The agreement the Election Commission reached ensures that local officials have more flexibility in administering the primary election during this unprecedented time. Democrats fought to make sure strong health guidelines were included in the order, as well as working to make it easier to recruit poll workers and expand sites to count absentee ballots with an expected increase in volume. In addition, issues were raised by Democrats at the meeting regarding absentee voting deadlines and mailing an absentee ballot application to voters. Unfortunately, these were voted down by the Republicans on the Commission. But Hoosier Democrats won't give up. We will continue the discussion on why vote-by-mail is the safest option at next week’s April 22 hearing. The good news is, we aren't wasting any time. We've launched a 100%-grassroots-funded, = to make sure Hoosiers know they can vote by mail. But we can't do it without supporters like you helping us get the word out. = -Cases reach new single-day high; testing hits a low point- On Thursday, we reached a record, single-day high of . But this week, , hitting numbers similar to where it was when it to the general public. As the number of cases rises, Indiana has continued to test well below its capacity. As of Thursday, had conducted less than half the total number of tests had done. This is especially problematic in long-term facilities, where healthy people are living in close quarters with COVID-19 patients. , unable to diagnose and separate sick residents from healthy ones. But, Gov. Holcomb has presented zero ideas and no timeline to ramp up testing to save lives. Help us call on Holcomb to step up and get Hoosiers the tests they need. Sign on to the petition . -Rep. Hollingsworth is willing to trade in lives for money- At the height of the coronavirus outbreak, was quoted saying that the country will have to choose "a loss of American lives" over "a loss of our way of life as Americans." While the Indiana Congressman knows that re-opening the economy would result in the death of countless Americans, he has made it abundantly clear he just doesn’t care. Let’s not mince words, Hollingsworth is an out-of-touch millionaire with more concern for shareholders’ pocketbooks than Hoosiers' lives. We’re calling on Hollingsworth to apologize to the Hoosiers whose lives he devalued and those who have lost loved ones to COVID-19. Join us in demanding an apology . -We’re moving the 2020 State Convention online- On Tuesday, the that it would hold its 2020 State Convention on June 13 with events held virtually and votes cast by mail. The plan to go virtual was unanimously approved by the Party’s State Central Committee. We are confident that this is the safest way to bring Hoosier Democrats from around the state together and maintain a critical element of the electoral process. -Resources- Need a hand applying to vote by mail? Check out the = for deadlines and instructions on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot. You can also find a 30-second video on how to fill out your vote by mail application =. ¿Hablas español? ¿Quieres votar por el correo? Tenemos un diagrama para ti . Looking for ways to receive or provide COVID-19 relief? We have created a running list of = across our state . -Save the date- \- April 16, 7 PM EST, Zoom meeting Marion County Young Democrats: - April 16, 6 PM EST, Zoom Meeting Planned Parenthood Advocates of Indiana and Kentucky: , April 21, 7-7:30 PM EST, Virtual Planned Parenthood Advocates of Indiana and Kentucky: , April 22, 5 PM EST, Zoom Citizens Action Coalition: (Boone and Hamilton Counties) - April 23, 6:30-8 PM EST, Zoom meeting Cass County: \- April 28, 6:30-8 PM EST, Virtual Boone County: \- April 29, 6:30-8:30 PM EST, Zoom meeting Cass County: \- Every Saturday, 9-10 AM EST, Virtual | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party** 101 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN 46202 (317) 231-7100 | ---|--- | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

This is great news! In the last independent poll of this race in February, we were tied with likely Republican nominee Kris Kobach at 43%. This proves that momentum is on our side. But our 2 point lead is still within the margin-of-error, and Kobach's special interest allies have already committed to spending millions to support him.

We need your help _right now_ to defeat them and build on our lead.

[That's why I'm setting a $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal. Here are our top takeaways from this poll:

1. Kansans believe in our message of sending a voice of reason to the Senate.
2. Special interests are going to continue meddling in this race to try and boost Kobach.
3. 13% of Kansans are still undecided in this race -- we need to convince them to stand with us!

We can absolutely win this Senate seat and send a voice of reason to Washington. But we need to be doing everything we can to keep up our momentum, and with the serious public health concerns posed by the COVID-19 pandemic, we can't hold any of the in-person campaign events we had previously planned.

**Unfortunately, that means we 'll have a huge gap in our April fundraising numbers -- unless this grassroots team can step up in a big way and help us get over the finish line.**

[Team, make a $10 contribution now to help us build on the momentum of this poll and show you're with us in this fight.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c75/4bd7760e/5a29d0df/77af584a/668126804/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiIsImUzdGhjMnQ5ZlE9PSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-bollierpoll-split?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+FIRSTNAMETeam+make+a+ask+contribution+no&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200417_1MC-1MO_STD_1_Bollierpoll&source=314_EM_FR_200417_1MC-1MO_STD_1_Bollierpoll&refcode=314_EM_FR_200417_1MC-1MO_STD_1_Bollierpoll")

This public health crisis means I'm relying on our online fundraising efforts now more than ever. You have all had my back throughout this campaign, and I am so grateful for your continued support. I know I can count on you to help us meet our ambitious mid-month goal so we don't fall behind in this race.

Thank you,

Barbara Bollier

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1.81 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c75/4bd7760e/5a29d0df/77af5848/668126804/VEsHBw/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_200417_1MC-1MO_STD_1_Bollierpoll&source=314_EM_FR_200417_1MC-1MO_STD_1_Bollierpoll")** to make a donation.

clean_body: Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team. = We had a strong first quarter, and we need your help to keep our momentum going! = = Friends -- My name is Stephanie, and I'm Michelle De La Isla's campaign manager. Right now, Michelle's focus is on protecting the health and safety of her community as mayor, but she wanted me to let you know how honored she is by the grassroots support this campaign has received. Thanks to people like you, we had an incredible first quarter in this campaign. So strong in fact, we outraised not only the incumbent, but more than the entire GOP field combined! It's clear: Kansans are ready for a leader who will lift up their voices and advocate for them in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Stephanie Stephanie Houghton Campaign Manager Team Michelle Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Finance HQ
subject: Mid-Month Goal Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
MJ just asked me for an update...

|
---

| | Hey Peter,

MJ just asked me for an update on our April Mid-Month Goal. We aren't quite there yet, so I want to try and get a bit closer before I email her! We're almost there team, and if you're able to donate today, you might just put us over. **[Can I count on your help to give MJ some good news?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890357/7f51f7bc/4f631243/4ef115c1/867311100/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200417.2nd__1244__&amount=10")**

Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890357/7f51f7bc/4f631243/4ef115c1/867311100/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200417.2nd__1244__&amount=10")**
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: Mid-Month goal?
To: Taylor Klos (mjfortexas.com)
> Hey Taylor!
>
> Was hoping to get an update on our April Mid-Month Goal? This is going to be an important goal for setting us up for the runoff and beyond, so I'm hoping our team will carry this one home for us like they always have! How's it looking?
>
> Looking forward to the good news!
>
> \-- MJ
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890357/7f51f7bc/4f631243/4ef115c5/867311100/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1244&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890357/7f51f7bc/4f631243/4ef1163b/867311100/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Let's "get together" May 4th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
On May 4th we'll be holding a virtual meet and greet with guest speakers to discuss the importance of electing progressives in the Midwest. Join us! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8890f1ff5770/lets-get-together-may-4th?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
|
> | | | | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together._
> ---
| |
I am excited to announce that our campaign will be hosting our first digital fundraiser via Zoom on [Monday, May 4th!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ecb6381886&e=140a9b81e7)

We'll be joined by our hosts and guest speakers _Laura Greene Welch, the President of Illinois National Organization for Women_ , and _Paul Kendrick, the Executive Director of Rust Belt Rising._

Join us as we discuss the importance of electing progressives in the midwest in 2020, and how **we plan to work together to remove the last remaining Republican member of Congress in northern Illinois**

[Grab your tickets to the event here!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=24497dc629&e=140a9b81e7)

While we can't gather in person during this time of social distancing, we can still come together and work toward achieving our progressive goals.

I look forward to seeing you there, and I am grateful to have you on my side.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic nominee for Congress, IL-16
---
| | [Grab your tickets for as little as $5!]( "Grab your tickets for as little as $5!")
---

Dani for Illinois

name: Jaime Harrison
subject: ALERT: Lindsey criticizes coronavirus payments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d04f4/72412298/4fefdf6c/6104ed73/1747572601/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200417_Harrison_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200417_Harrison_U1_X1")

| | . When South Carolinians are suffering because of Lindsey Graham's views and actions, I have to stand up for what's right. **Even in the midst of an international pandemic, Lindsey is still playing politics with the livelihoods of South Carolina families.** [](https://go.protectvoting.%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_harrison?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200417_Harrison_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200417_Harrison_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200417_Harrison_U1_X1") **It 's times like these that show why campaigns like mine are SO important to restoring leadership and sanity to the Senate.** And a new poll has my campaign statistically **TIED** with Lindsey Graham. But his dark-money donors are already lining up to spend whatever they need to keep him in the Senate to do their bidding. I'm depending on folks like you to help keep up my campaign's momentum.
