name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Tele-Town Halls, Dems play politics with small business relief, and more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [ Contact Us ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/985a9d38d87fff51c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**N.H. Senator Shaheen and Other Democrats are Stalling Critical Aid to State's Small Businesses by Playing Politics, Says Messner**
U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen and other Senate and House Democrats are delaying critical assistance to New Hampshire's small businesses by playing politics.
"The Paycheck Protection Program, which was a key component of the coronavirus stimulus package, exhausted its funding Thursday and the Senate recessed. Democrats in the Senate, including career politician Senator Shaheen, continue to stall more funding for this critical assistance to New Hampshire businesses," says Corky. "And why? It's all politics."
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/b6014d4d8f6d5088c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell last week urged Congress to pass a $250 billion funding increase for the small-business program, but Democrats objected, saying they want some of the money reserved for women- and minority-owned businesses, and additional funding for hospitals and the federal Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.

"Once again, D.C. Jeanne is taking her cue from Nancy Pelosi and her most liberal Senate colleagues, abandoning Granite Staters' best interests to kowtow to the progressive agenda and special interests. There is an astounding lack of urgency coming from Jeanne Shaheen and her out-of-touch circle. Time matters in a crisis, as out-of-work Americans are worried not only about their health and the health of their families, but also worried about paying rent and putting food on the table.”

**[Read more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/e2a41410eb45952ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**In The News**
WMUR’s Primary Source reported Corky has been endorsed by an influential state senator and named a longtime activist and business leader as his campaign’s finance chair. He has also received the support of seven current and one former state House members, several of whom initially supported former New Hampshire House Speaker Bill O’Brien, who ended his campaign and endorsed Messner two weeks ago.

[**Read the story**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/6b2e1186513cbf90c3d6b838967d376c/33153).
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/61b53cd659057f43c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Messner Tele-Town Halls Pack ‘em In**
Corky’s continuing Tele-Town Halls are aggressively attracting voters. The Manchester event drew 1,171 callers, the Concord event drew 1,884 attendees, and the Nashua town hall included 2,452 participants.
“Granite Staters continue to be engaged, informed voters,” says Corky, “people who are using this ‘down time’ to learn more about upcoming races and the candidates looking for their support. I am encouraged by folks who are active participants in the political process – it’s the New Hampshire way!”
|
---
**Messner Minute: Peeling Back the Onion**
Corky hosted a Facebook Live event and explained why U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen can hardly take credit for being the “lead negotiator” of the CARES Act and boasting about the money she got New Hampshire.

**[Learn more](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/6428b16c3ba32481c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/2213874a7b2eb2b0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO**
Once again, here’s a list of resources for Granite Staters in need of assistance or information. Please do all you can to keep yourself, your family and friends, and your community healthy – and remember to support local businesses!

**HEALTH INFORMATION**

White House Guidelines: 30 Days to Slow the Spread – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/449cea2235a021a9c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/1307853ce75d116bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
New Hampshire Division of Public Health Services – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/af51558d271b15bac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
For general assistance, a 211 site to locate resources – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/a4134c5aa904298ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
Centers for Disease Control: What to do if you are sick with coronavirus disease – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/b1645f96dbfabb33c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR BUSINESSES/EMPLOYMENT**

NH Department of Employment Security
Due to COVID-19, all claims and questions should be directed to **[nhes.nh.gov](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/5ae9d5334f701c8dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** or call the Unemployment Assistance Hotline at 603-271-7700.
Coronavirus (COVID-19): Small Business Guidance & Loan Resources – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/da6046434a66bfa6c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
Resources for Small Business – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/00daaaad31149aaac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**RESOURCES FOR PARENTS AND SCHOOLS**

NH Department of Education – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/9e2c749312a2b77bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
How to Home School Your Children – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/e7627517aa28ba20c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**FOR ASSISTANCE – FOOD**

Meals on Wheels – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/eb6a424cf8de7b5bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
NH Food Bank – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/aea5f01e8aa7fb2dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
School Food and Nutrition Service – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/f78eecf5f15690eac3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

**HOW YOU CAN HELP**

NH Food Bank – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/6e8c58c3bc5f2c77c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

Meals on Wheels – To volunteer – **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/791d186d5a0b530d/09c079c16ccbd7fcc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

| | | _**KEY EXCERPT: **__"Good leaders keep people informed, calm, and feeling positive about the future and Governor Sununu has done that while giving credit to others and making us proud to be Granite Staters."_
**By Representatives Tim Lang, Mike Moffett, Reed Panasiti and Howard Pearl** ****_“IT WAS the best of times, it was the worst of times, it was the age of wisdom, it was the age of foolishness.”_ — **A Tale of Two Cities** Charles Dickens’ words may aptly be applied to 2020 New Hampshire vs. 2010 New Hampshire — and an age of wisdom vs. an age of foolishness regarding state fiscal policy. **Leadership matters and we’re fortunate that in the last four years Governor Chris Sununu enhanced our financial stability** by using one-time monies for one-time projects and restocking our “Rainy Day Fund,” increasing it to a record $115 million.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Butterfield: "Trump a Domestic Enemy"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I am a patriot! I was an original supporter of President Trump in 2015.

Unlike the Republican establishment, _I stuck with the president - through all the media’s attempts to discredit him._

I am proud of what President Trump has done during his first term, to include his handling of this horrible Coronavirus attack on our country!

If you are proud of our president, as I am, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

My support of the president and my conservative platform of protecting our guns, protecting life, securing the border, and reigning in out of control spending was a major reason I won the Republican primary in March.

Conservative Trump voters in my district voted for me with a whopping 77% of the vote! I won more than 30,000 primary votes in this district - **we are on fire for the President and ready to flip this seat!**

There are many people coming on board with my campaign. I have already been endorsed by _Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows_. Here is a picture of me and Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ)
---

_The Congressman whose district I was redrawn into, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, is a high-level Democrat in Nancy Pelosi’s congressional socialist army_. He is one of her top lieutenants, and before that, he was a top campaigner for Hillary Clinton against Donald Trump. Taking out Butterfield will deal a massive blow to the anti-American far-left socialist agenda.
[ ](secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/st)
---

I am also honored to have been endorsed by the National Association of Gun Rights and Americans for Legal Immigration PAC. **They recognize me as being a staunch defender of our Second Amendment rights and opposing open borders!**

With the way President Trump has masterfully handled the Russia hoax, the impeachment hoax, and now the Coronavirus, he will be reelected in a landslide. The Fake News is begging him to stop his nightly press conferences that are getting him higher approval numbers than any president in recent history.

That’s why I’m running. President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

First, the Never-Trumper Republican establishment - Mitt Romney and Paul Ryan, the “Surrender Caucus”- fought against the President’s attempts to get government out of our Health Care.

Then, Nancy Pelosi and the revenge-driven Democrats started pushing for open borders and higher taxes, a page right out of the Communist Manifesto and implemented by the Soviet Union!

Can you believe this?!? I can’t! That’s why [I’m asking for your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ) most urgently! Please send whatever amount you can spare to get me over the finish line.

**It is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district** \- which North Carolina’s First District now is! They just redrew the map and took away a bunch of Democrat voters, making this district MUCH more competitive.

[ ](secure.anedot.com/sandysmithforcongress/st)
---

As a top anti-Trump attack dog for Pelosi and Hillary, G.K. Butterfield has been responsible for the worst assaults on our Constitution the radical activist Democrat Congress has proposed:

• _G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. He voted for impeachment, not for any crime, but for political differences. _

• _He supports gun confiscation, socialized medicine, and abortion on demand up until birth. He actually voted for all of these! This makes me so angry!_

_• Butterfield voted for open borders, allowing for the Coronavirus and other diseases and crime to flood out country. He doesn’t want a wall and wants to let criminal illegal aliens stay here indefinitely – and give them handouts, voting rights, and free college!_

_• He wants ICE abolished and hates our brave law enforcement officers! This is straight up anti-American!_

_• G.K. Butterfield votes nearly 100% of the time with Nancy Pelosi. I will vote nearly 0% of the time with Nancy Pelosi! She will be terrified when she loses her top lieutenant when he is defeated in November._

As mentioned above, G. K. Butterfield just voted for the impeachment coup of arguably one of the greatest presidents our nation has elected. Yet, read an excerpt from this explanation of why he voted to impeach President Trump. **He called President Trump a domestic enemy!**

“ _President Trump put himself before country and violated his oath of office. The oath I took is clear— I have sworn to support and defend the Constitution against _**all enemies, foreign and domestic**_. Based on the evidence before us, _**I voted in favor of both Articles of Impeachment against Donald J. Trump.**_ No one is above the law_.” – G.K. Butterfield

Why is Butterfield so radical and why does he hate President Trump so much?

_Before this year, he has never had a credible challenger!_

But this year, this district turned into a swing district. **Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield**. They don’t know him, and they are Republicans!

With President Trump having such high favorability, and with my decisive primary win of 77%, and the fact that do-nothing Butterfield has never had a real opponent, we are going to WIN!

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ) I need you to send $15, $35, or $250 right now so that I can meet my goal by the end of this month. This deadline is so critical, and I have no time to lose.

You already know where I stand and that I will deliver on every important vote.... always! I won't waiver!

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

We only need 18 seats to retake Congress. Can you picture what Congress would look like without Nancy Pelosi?

Think about it:

_No impeachment. No tax hikes. No socialized medicine. No stifling regulations. No gun confiscations. No infanticide. No gotcha or pork-barrel addons to bills._

To me, THAT’S a future we can agree on! _That’s keeping America great_.

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hda9P7zJapNxmng&b=uJwP304JbuS_XllsJ_XcKQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxsTEycHOws) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCxsTEycHOws)

_**...and it's now the Liberal Super PAC that is going ALL IN against the President.**_
**[STAND WITH TRUMP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lpMZo34ptaPriN6hpjuvFsqgFsADPaXUPuBtFmIZWX2bY-NrZVzn1JdHidPQ7QgjnPMgR0v6N8m2jIhFZnzrhFd8PwDqIgcupLOYg1a2SQYzL1Z4OegnMUTzYrL0t2HVxAJOIRh5GJh_jf3Q8EIG5XJHkKwWJcnoEJKQEUVjjYjiaWf3TofG3kQNKqEW3VQvDxhe8QMHejHlNUlOVkgWaORpj3agCwTYEhcp5MN9CWqD1XWNSyhWzSRFawBd5wbfGBElG_HSvVS8zLr7ATKwundJuIFyfmi_UyCSvtu-Q-TNiiyb6_LG9BwoBKlyqAAyMyfXucc_EtpxEB9Z78OZ6OEQL5eOk2WGcn4uyS42rAUFXOsnZ1Sx78A_AtCHqyEpKpH3cb28Qa25rrOJXoMgddAqV2b53LImifZJtL3bRQ06DbHaCMxrgNkh6dL7jQcGWEEZzp4aCJ5kw5XPeINDSQ==&c=mPw_UuZ3wc9nzLGbfHJRZYmy3-p7G4swKUD-nRNneVPZaDm8FNiLfQ==&ch=BFj7WyerdiznZbJ9EpQETGNZuqTrDqgOk6H1qAzXebOYbfs0Y3pQrQ==)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Updates: Indiana Republican State Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
We wanted to take a moment to update you on a unanimous recommendation today by the Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee regarding our | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/updates-indiana-republican-state-convention?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| Hello,

We wanted to take a moment to update you on a unanimous recommendation today by the Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee regarding our upcoming 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention. As we face the global COVID-19 pandemic, our rules committee has recommended the passage of these rules to ensure the party can appropriately carry out our state convention in a way that is fair and safe for all.

Throughout this process, we have given our best effort to approach any discussion in a transparent and fair way, including drastically increased communication with and guidance from every member of our State Committee and proactive outreach to county party chairs, including district committee conference calls with Chairman Hupfer.

Throughout every discussion, we have maintained two goals:
* **If at all possible, given the facts on the ground, the Indiana Republican Party’s first goal is to host an in-person state convention as planned on June 20th.**
* **If the situation on the ground does not allow for some form of in-person voting on June 20th, the Indiana Republican Party is committed to offering a voting option to ensure our state convention delegates are given the best opportunity possible to select our party’s nominees for Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General.**

In full transparency, we want to share with you three documents:
* **[April 1 State Committee Memo](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a636b3770b&e=1acd9bb3d6): **This memo was given to the State Committee on April 1st as a discussion document to lead the conversation on each item that needs to be considered given our postponed election date, and any potential impact to our state and national conventions that could come from the COVID-19 pandemic. Please note that all possible outcomes are included here to ensure members understood the full scope for discussion purposes.
* **[April 15 State Committee Memo](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b34fb11f56&e=1acd9bb3d6): **This memo outlines the facts on the ground at the time, lays out in detail how a vote-by-mail alternative could work if necessary, and details other changes that would need to be considered, regardless of whether an in-person or a mail option is to move forward. The outline of a potential vote-by-mail convention includes pursuing options for some sort of virtual convention option for convention formalities (such as candidate speeches); a description of how vote counting could work in a way which mimics classic “round” convention voting and ensures that a winner must receive 50%+1 of delegates voting; an unbiased, fair process with outside vendors handling ballots (creation, mailing, receiving and counting) throughout the process; and candidate watchers included in counting, as would be done with an in-person vote.
* **[April 17 Temporary Rules as Recommended by the Rules Committee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f70f65ca4&e=1acd9bb3d6):** These rules allow for continuing a duel track format to ensure the appropriate call can be made at the right time, and that the appropriate structure is built to handle a convention in whatever format is necessitated at the time. It is also important to note that these temporary rules would expire on October 1, 2020.

Throughout this process there has been and will continue to be a lot of misinformation spread around the state. We, however, want to be sure that we at the Indiana Republican Party are as clear and transparent as possible. **Please take this information, review it, and do not hesitate to reach out to us to ensure you understand what exactly is being proposed and offer your input. **

_**It is absolutely critical to our process that our delegates are heard and allowed to be engaged, and we will do everything in our power to protect their right to select our party nominees for Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General.**_

This recommendation will be reviewed once again by the State Committee, and ultimately be voted up or down at an Indiana Republican State Committee meeting on April 29, 2020. We look for your input prior to this meeting.

Thank you,

_Kyle Hupfer, Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
Mindy Westrick Brown, State Secretary, Indiana Republican Party
Jamey Noel, Chairman, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Ethan Manning, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Sharon Negele, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Mitch Harper, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Judy Buck, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Kyle Walker, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Nate Harter, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee
Lesa Dietrick, Member, Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee_
---

---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b2bc2e5db5&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Will you become one of our founding members?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
When I announced that I was running for U.S. Senate back in January, I knew that I was fighting an uphill battle.
#
When I announced that I was running for U.S. Senate back in January, I knew that I was fighting an uphill battle. I didn’t have a lot of money or big-name connections in D.C., but I had a message and knew that there are a lot of people like me who are hungry for change.
And just over these past few months, our movement has grown to the largest it’s ever been. Our bold, progressive vision of Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and universal basic income continues to reach people everywhere -- and it’s allowed me to connect with and listen to some pretty incredible people.
**[I’m deeply appreciative and grateful for your support thus far, but I have an important ask: will you become a Founding Member of our grassroots campaign today and make a gift of $20.20 (or whatever you can afford)?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17179926/185297255/-1771214525?refcode=em20200417&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTJiYTI1Mi1mYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nm5Ny5VrxQhYds_tORHCmdr5Z6vPtR4k9Ku4BXbb8yk=)**
****[Contribute $20.20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17179927/185297256/-1771214525?refcode=em20200417&amount=20.20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTJiYTI1Mi1mYzgwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nm5Ny5VrxQhYds_tORHCmdr5Z6vPtR4k9Ku4BXbb8yk=)****
Your support as a Founding Member of Team Booker is more than just another donation. It’s a concrete way to show that our grassroots, small-dollar campaign has real strength in numbers -- and to send a clear message to Mitch and his team that we’re ready to do whatever it takes to send them packing.
And as the primaries get closer, one thing is for certain: **it’s going to take a real Democrat -- like myself -- to drive Mitch out of power.** Not an establishment, milquetoast Democrat who isn’t willing to fight for the bold, progressive solutions we so strongly and proudly believe in.
But I’m proud to fight for these solutions, and I’m honored to fight every day alongside you and to take our power and our future back.
I want to make sure I remember your name as one of the early supporters who helped us build this movement and changed the course of history in Kentucky.
**[So: I hope you’ll consider joining my campaign as a Founding Member. clean_body: When I announced that I was running for U.S. Senate back in January, I knew that I was fighting an uphill battle. When I announced that I was running for U.S. Senate back in January, I knew that I was fighting an uphill battle. I didn’t have a lot of money or big-name connections in D.C., but I had a message and knew that there are a lot of people like me who are hungry for change. And just over these past few months, our movement has grown to the largest it’s ever been. Our bold, progressive vision of Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and universal basic income continues to reach people everywhere -- and it’s allowed me to connect with and listen to some pretty incredible people. = **= Your support as a Founding Member of Team Booker is more than just another donation. It’s a concrete way to show that our grassroots, small-dollar campaign has real strength in numbers -- and to send a clear message to Mitch and his team that we’re ready to do whatever it takes to send them packing. And as the primaries get closer, one thing is for certain: it’s going to take a real Democrat -- like myself -- to drive Mitch out of power. Not an establishment, milquetoast Democrat who isn’t willing to fight for the bold, progressive solutions we so strongly and proudly believe in. But I’m proud to fight for these solutions, and I’m honored to fight every day alongside you and to take our power and our future back. I want to make sure I remember your name as one of the early supporters who helped us build this movement and changed the course of history in Kentucky. = Yours in action, Charles Booker =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

There is no way around it -- _**George Soros, Donald Sussman and other far left billionaires are bankrolling her campaign.**_ We need **YOUR** help to fight back against Gideon and her Far Left allies that are trying to control Maine's election.

-Team Collins

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | = Wisconsin voters were forced to brave the virus to cast their ballots last week. They waited in line for hours, potentially putting their health at risk to exercise their right to vote. I'm worried this is what our election could look like if more action isn't taken to mail vote-by-mail applications to every Hoosier voter before the primary in June. = Peter, Republicans still haven't agreed to mail every Hoosier an application. But we're not waiting, we've launched an outreach effort to make sure Hoosiers know they can vote by mail. We want to do our part to make sure Indiana's primary election doesn't look like Wisconsin's. But we can't get there without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. name: Team Mackler
subject: Our opponent thinks this is "great news" →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
We couldn't disagree more.
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16a/18d6a294/4cb2370a/26d616d5/2686101336/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | This is outrageous: President Trump announced he will cut off U.S. funding for the World Health Organization, and our opponent Bill Hagerty called it "great news." We're in the middle of a global pandemic, and cutting the WHO's funding during this pandemic makes as much sense as cutting funding for the military during war. _It 's wrong and it's the furthest thing from "great news."_ [_**We can 't afford another Trump rubber stamp like Hagerty in the Senate. If you can, chip in to our campaign today to stop him from going to Washington.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16a/18d6a294/4cb2370a/26d616d2/2686101336/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmF0In0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200417?refcode=jme200417_nat&recurring=true") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16a/18d6a294/4cb2370a/26d616d3/2686101336/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTciLCJlM3NnWVhOck1TQjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuYXQiLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200417?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200417_nat_&refcode2=107423")

| | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16a/18d6a294/4cb2370a/26d616de/2686101336/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmF0In0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200417?refcode=jme200417_nat_other&refcode2=107423")
---
The WHO plays a critical role in our response to health crises. There have been more than 20,000 coronavirus-related deaths in the U.S. -- the most in the world -- and Trump is playing the blame game and cutting off critical funding when it's needed the most.
Trump downplayed the severity and seriousness of this pandemic, botched our response, and now he's trying to distract from his own failures and deflect blame somewhere else. He refuses to take any responsibility for his failures.
By doing this now, Trump is putting even more Americans in danger.
**Bill Hagerty thinks that 's "great news" and that means he doesn't belong in the Senate.**
[_**James is in this race to do what 's right and he'll stand up to any president when they're wrong -- unlike our opponent who has time and again promised to be a rubber stamp for Trump. That's why we need your help to make sure James wins in November. If you are able, chip in to our campaign today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa16a/18d6a294/4cb2370a/26d616d2/2686101336/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA0MTciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmF0In0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200417?refcode=jme200417_nat&recurring=true")
Thanks,
Team Mackler

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kansans=20for=20LaTurner?=
subject: We maintain a strong lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/211c85584fe4/for-immediate-release-kansas-state-treasurer-jake-laturner-announces-candidacy-for-us-congress-6869170?e=1050d051da)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

We understand that times are tough. Kansans are struggling. We're dealing with a global pandemic and the American economy has been put on pause. **But we wanted to share some good news from our campaign. **
---
|
---
| Thanks to the generous support of Kansans over the past year, we continue to maintain our strong fundraising lead over our opponents' campaigns. **Here's a quick breakdown of money that each campaign has to spend.**
* **Jake LaTurner** \- Republican
* $571,647 - Cash on Hand
* **Steve Watkins** \- Republican
* $437,819 - Cash on Hand
* $275,722 \- Debts
* **Michelle De La Isla** \- Democrat
* $266,930 - Cash on Hand

We are grateful to all of you for standing with us. We are on a path to victory. This report proves the entire reason for Jake LaTurner’s candidacy. Steve Watkins places this seat in deep jeopardy of Democrat takeover by a Nancy Pelosi backed liberal parading as a moderate. _**Treasurer LaTurner has significantly more cash on hand than any of his opponents and doesn’t carry the baggage of a felony investigation or a liberal record. **_
[We know times are tough, but could you consider chipping in to make sure we keep our fundraising lead? Anything helps.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4b13b92c36&e=1050d051da)

Help us keep this forward momentum going by donating [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=09136c57a9&e=1050d051da). Together we can keep the Democrats from scoring another seat in Congress from our state, and instead send a conservative fighter to Washington!

Yours in the fight,
Team LaTurner
---
| [Chip in to Keep Kansas Red](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9c7eb40fed&e=1050d051da "Chip in to Keep Kansas Red")

*P.O. Box 67237, Topeka, KS 66667

clean_body: | | | | I am very excited to share that the only organization focused exclusively on electing solidly conservative women, Right Women PAC, has endorsed our campaign! Email not displaying correctly? == in your browser. EXCITING NEWS - Top Conservative Endorsement Dear Lowcountry Friends, I am very excited to share that the only organization focused exclusively on electing solidly conservative women, Right Women PAC, has endorsed our campaign! This is huge news and shows the continued momentum our campaign is building as we quickly approach the June 9th Republican Primary. Right Women PAC only endorses candidates who are: I certainly and proudly meet those qualities! Debbie Meadows, the Executive Director of Right Women PAC and the wife of President Trump's Chief of Staff Mark Meadows, also added this about me in the endorsement: “Kathy is a staunch conservative. She is one of the hardest-working women I know. Kathy’s decades-long professional experience as a financial planner and her service over the past three years as city councilwoman have earned her the trust of her clients and community. Her business experience is precisely what our nation needs as we tackle the economic recovery.” Like Debbie, I believe I offer a much-needed skill set in these unprecedented times. And I am eager to get to work for you in Congress, to represent our Lowcountry values, and serve our district proudly. If you are like Debbie and Right Women PAC Advisory Board members Polly Jordan, wife of Freedom Caucus Founding Chair Jim Jordan, and Elaine Norman, wife of South Carolina Congressman Ralph Norman – and you know that I am the strongest Republican to win this seat back for conservatives, families, and sensible solutions, I need your support today. 1\. Take a minute to like our . 2\. Display a yard sign or bumper magnet by . 3\. Call or text 5 family members, friends, or neighbors and let them know you are voting Kathy Landing for Congress on June 9th. I can’t thank you enough for all you have done and will continue to do to help us win this seat back! On to Victory, | Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress PS - I know times are hard right now, but if you are able, I humbly ask that you chip in what you can to support our campaign efforts by or on the donate button below. Thanks! | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " ---|--- | | Kathy Landing for Congress PO Box 31338 Charleston, SC 29417 == | ==

Here's why we need a boost of support today:
Our Republican opponent has more than ONE MILLION in his campaign war chest -- with even more reinforcements coming from Republican dark money groups.
**They are willing to do anything possible to keep a Donald Trump rubber stamp in this seat. But central New York is eager for new leadership, and I am confident that I can deliver that new leadership.**
**[So please, make a donation so we can raise another $2,000 for our grassroots campaign TODAY and help us show the GOP that our representation is NOT up for sale to the highest bidder.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b4e6/388db0e9/8d1b809/609ba29f/1755557300/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9hcHIiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDQxN18yMDBkYXlzb3V0X1UxX1gxIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_apr?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200417_200daysout_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+So+please+make+a+donation+so+we+can+rais&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200417_200DaysOut_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200417_200DaysOut_U1_X1")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: Pennsylvania's primary is now June 2nd. Here's how to vote by mail.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
You can safely cast your vote by mail this year. |
#
Team, It's no secret that Pennsylvania is one of the most important battleground states this year. In 2016, Donald Trump won the Keystone State by less than 50,000 votes -- a razor thin margin that was only achievable because far too many Democrats didn't turn out to vote. Fortunately, voting in Pennsylvania has become a lot easier. Now, every voter can safely cast their ballot by mail in this year's primary and general election. **The Pennsylvania primary has been moved back to Tuesday, June 2nd. Here are the simple steps you can take to vote by mail in the primary:**
1. Request your mail-in ballot **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e51/5fca0d19/7d97c7a5/291d6d88/4177135010/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin")**.
2. Wait to receive your ballot in the mail.
3. Complete the ballot and mail it to your county election office. In order to count, your ballot must be received by 8 p.m. on Tuesday, June 2nd.
4. That's it!

In the Senate, I've been a strong advocate for expanding vote-by-mail nationwide. Thanks to Governor Wolf's leadership, Pennsylvania has already stepped up by giving all voters the option to safely and securely cast their ballot from home. [**No one should have to choose between exercising their right to vote or protecting their health. Please sign up to vote by mail today.**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e51/5fca0d19/7d97c7a5/291d6d88/4177135010/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin") Thanks for making sure your vote is counted. Stay safe,
Cory Booker | [REQUEST YOUR BALLOT](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e51/5fca0d19/7d97c7a5/291d6d88/4177135010/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.pavoterservices.pa.gov/OnlineAbsenteeApplication/#/OnlineAbsenteeBegin")
---

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
[unsubscribe](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e51/5fca0d19/7d97c7a5/291d6d97/4177135010/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe")

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Get our manufacturing out of China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
First, the Chinese Communist Party lied about the Wuhan virus to cover it up. Then, they silenced whistleblowers and withheld data. Now, they are blocking American companies from shipping critical medical supplies that are desperately needed around the globe. That’s right: China caused this pandemic and they’re making it worse.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42290849&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTg3MjY0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0
Peter,

First, the Chinese Communist Party lied about the Wuhan virus to cover it up. Then, they silenced whistleblowers and withheld data.

Now, they are blocking American companies from shipping critical medical supplies that are desperately needed around the globe. That’s right: China caused this pandemic and they’re making it worse.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIyOTA4NDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTg3MjY0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Sign the Petition http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDIyOTA4NDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTg3MjY0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0 For years, China has targeted American manufacturing by stealing our jobs and intellectual property, meaning that an alarming share of our medical products are made in China.

We can’t trust the murderous Chinese Communist Party to manufacture medical products.

I believe that it’s time to bring this manufacturing back to America. I’ve got a bill that would end our dependence on Chinese manufacturing, and I want to know if you agree with me.

Sign this petition if you agree. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDIyOTA4NDkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTg3MjY0NQS2&mt=1&rt=0

We need to move manufacturing out of China and back to America, and we need to do it now.

Let me know if you agree.

subject: Please read before midnight tonight

During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Team -- Because of the recent huge investments from far-right special interest groups in our race, we set a goal of raising an additional $10,000 by midnight tonight. **Well, we’re still $2,289 away from hitting our goal, and I wanted to reach out to you, personally, team, to see if you could help us close the gap.**

You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58ea/2686847641/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&source=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58e9/2686847641/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1YTIyNGQ0ZiIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0Yzc4In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5a224d4f/29bb4c78?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&source=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja") to unsubscribe.
| | November brings the most consequential election of our lifetime -- it's critical that everyone has the ability to vote.

That is why vote by mail must be available to ALL voters.

S[ign on and demand that all state governments make voluntary vote by mail accessible for everyone:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58e8/2686847641/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-your-state-election-officials-vote-by-mail-must-be-available-to-all-voters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-votebymailja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200414_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+ign+on+and+demand+that+all+state+governm&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")

| [DEMAND VOTE BY MAIL](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58f7/2686847641/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-your-state-election-officials-vote-by-mail-must-be-available-to-all-voters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-votebymailja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200414_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+DEMAND+VOTE+BY+MAIL&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")
---

Listen, under normal circumstances, it is difficult for Americans to get to the ballot box on election day. Long lines, limited polling place hours, inconvenient polling locations, not getting time off work, and voter suppression all make voting a hurdle for many Americans.

Now we are dealing with a global pandemic, and voting in-person may put American's health in danger.

**It 's obvious:** Americans should not have to choose between the first amendment and their own safety.

[Sign our petition and demand that all state governments make voluntary vote by mail accessible for everyone:](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58f6/2686847641/VEsD/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-your-state-election-officials-vote-by-mail-must-be-available-to-all-voters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-votebymailja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200414_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Sign+our+petition+and+demand+that+all+st&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")

[Sign On](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58f5/2686847641/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-to-your-state-election-officials-vote-by-mail-must-be-available-to-all-voters?source=direct_link&referrer=group-314-action&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F314-votebymailja%3Frefcode%3D314_EM_JA_200414_1MO_1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja%26amount%3D25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+Sign+On&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&refcode=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1.77 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4c78/4bd7760e/5a224d4f/77af58f3/2686847641/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&source=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja&subsource=314_EM_JA_200416_6m_1MO-1MC_none_STD_2_votebymailja")** to make a donation.

Through these challenging times, I wanted to take a minute and say thank you – to our local Republican leaders, and every member of our Indiana...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Thankful

Through these challenging times, I wanted to take a minute and say thank you – to our local Republican leaders, and every member of our Indiana Republican grassroots team. You work so hard every election year to nominate and elect strong Republican leaders to all levels of government, from the Courthouse to the White House -- and together, we've been successful at winning races up and down the ballot. And I know we'll be successful again this year.

That past work has ensured that we've got top leaders guiding us through these unique times. They're making the difficult decisions at every level to keep Hoosiers safe, and for that we can all be thankful.

Last month, you probably saw that Governor Holcomb made the call that he’d be postponing all campaigning and fundraising, focusing 100% on this crisis. Well, because of your support throughout the years, I'm excited to share that his re-election campaign remains strong with $7.13 million in the bank, while our Democrat opponent can only claim a small fraction of that number. We were only able to post these strong numbers because of your years of support -- and again, for that, we're thankful.

And I'm also thankful going into this weekend. We've got another Super Saturday planned (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1HCQGJib9SE4Hhd3jKffdgiyxd4xV4P70LOG55SneiXg/viewform?edit_requested=true&mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) for tomorrow, and Hoosier Republicans from across the state are signed up to make calls from home, letting voters know about our election updates and that President Trump and Governor Holcomb still appreciate their support.

Thank you for being a key member of our Republican team, and soon enough, I know we'll be back together again fighting for more Republican victories.

- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was
https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/videos/3899232076783975/?__xts__[0]=68.ARBXo4A5EqMTG4DkidGue1klqXQsu6yNo27tRjNAmFxefkRzRUnBj2032cYi3hXzu4RMNRB1YEjVJL6OTpXmkocCkrO3Ny7rQqHzufhwKtTqSl69yOFgl_rCAzuewiZ4WYj9YElp4qsiYeBVdtRSsu_3lTjd3o5Wlobp1Z7hvu9H5CegXTDNunevnsiNfyW9sF9lqnXONgPRdfDz1lHzbyyiq3s6m94kCyuy6exLyKluOpxTeF_jio_f8ytmodG2d5wW5xkNqwHA7cyvYJoVjjHqY8azk79GcuVgxElbFqOQY6L_1oCFJWO6qWbqGiDM3uaFYok6WCF4fCokTaTc9t_kOoH6XNlr8UepTw&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Keeping Hoosiers Safe: Coronavirus

Governor Holcomb continues to take action to lead our state during this challenging time.

This week, he announced his plans for a gradual reopening of Indiana's economy! Governor Holcomb has been in constant contact with major industries and associations throughout the state and has asked for their recommendations for the changes they can make that will allow us to return to work safely. After a lot of thought and discussion here are some of the factors that led to setting early May as a potential date for reopening our state's economy:
* Sustained control of the rate of new coronavirus infections and hospitalizations.
* The enhanced ability to test for and trace the coronavirus.
* Sufficient health care capacity to handle a resurgence.
* Continuing to use best practices for social distancing in the workplace.

For the full video of this announcement, click here (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/videos/3899232076783975/?__xts__[0]=68.ARBXo4A5EqMTG4DkidGue1klqXQsu6yNo27tRjNAmFxefkRzRUnBj2032cYi3hXzu4RMNRB1YEjVJL6OTpXmkocCkrO3Ny7rQqHzufhwKtTqSl69yOFgl_rCAzuewiZ4WYj9YElp4qsiYeBVdtRSsu_3lTjd3o5Wlobp1Z7hvu9H5CegXTDNunevnsiNfyW9sF9lqnXONgPRdfDz1lHzbyyiq3s6m94kCyuy6exLyKluOpxTeF_jio_f8ytmodG2d5wW5xkNqwHA7cyvYJoVjjHqY8azk79GcuVgxElbFqOQY6L_1oCFJWO6qWbqGiDM3uaFYok6WCF4fCokTaTc9t_kOoH6XNlr8UepTw&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Thank you to every Hoosier who is doing his or her part to stop the spread of the coronavirus and flatten the curve. We're #INThisTogether!

Election Update: June 2 Primary

Last month, Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana’s primary election is moving to June 2. During this primary, any registered voter has the option to cast their ballot via a mail-in absentee ballot. So far, more than 70,400 Indiana voters have requested their absentee ballot for the primary!

--> Learn more about requesting an absentee ballot here <-- (https://www.in.gov/sos/elections/2402.htm?mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
Election Updates:
* Upcoming deadlines – May 4 deadline to register to vote and May 21 to request an absentee ballot.
* Limited early in-person voting will be available for one week, from May 26^th to June 1^st.
* Poll workers are currently required to live in the county they work for. This requirement is waived so long as the voter is registered to vote in Indiana.
* Secretary of State Connie Lawson and the Indiana Election Division will provide counties with training and guidelines on mail handling procedures and personal protective equipment.
* The Commission advises that all public buildings, such as fire stations and school buildings, be available for use for the June 2^nd Primary.
* All absentee ballot applications submitted after December 2^nd will be accepted regardless of excuse given, as long as they are otherwise compliant with Indiana law.
* County election boards may adopt more than one central count location.
* Counties may move a polling location after giving best possible notice to the public.
* Secretary of State Connie Lawson will procure PPE for poll workers and cleaning supplies in all 92 counties with a $7.9 million request from the federal election COVID-19 fund. This will not impact critical care and other medical supply chains.

--> Read today's the full updates here <-- (https://www.in.gov/sos/elections/files/Order%202020-40%20Draft%20PDF.pdf?mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

As we continue to fight the coronavirus, changes have been made to our primary election process, but Governor Holcomb wants Hoosiers to know that we will have a safe and secure election.
2020 Indiana Republican State Convention: Fair & Safe

Earlier today, the Indiana Republican State Committee Rules Committee made a unanimous recommendation regarding the upcoming 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention in June. This recommendation is for the full committee to pass temporary rules to ensure the party can appropriately carry out a convention in away that is fair and safe for all.

Throughout every conversation, the goals have been:
* If at all possible, given the facts on the ground, the Indiana Republican Party’s first goal is to host an in-person state convention as planned on June 20th.
* If the situation on the ground does not allow for some form of in-person voting on June 20th, the Indiana Republican Party is committed to offering a voting option to ensure our state convention delegates are given the best opportunity possible to select our party’s nominees for Lieutenant Governor and Attorney General.

In case you missed it -- read the entire letter from the Rules Committee on their recommendation here (https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1559200ee1&mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=3037136146350140&mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Senator Young: Updates on the Federal Response
In case you missed it, Senator Todd Young joined Governor Holcomb yesterday to provide updates on the federal government's work providing COVID-19 relief for Hoosiers.

His updates included:
* The Small Business Administration reports 23,583 Paycheck Protection Program loans have been approved in Indiana totaling just under $6 billion.
* The first round of individual recovery rebate payments should begin hitting individual bank accounts this week for those with direct deposit information on file with the IRS.
* Working in close consultation with the Governor’s Office, Senator Young has helped secure shipments of masks from China and Taiwan expected to arrive in the coming weeks.
* The U.S. Department of Agriculture will be issuing guidance soon for Hoosier farmers to apply for financial support.

--> Click here to see his full update <-- (https://www.facebook.com/indgop/videos/3037136146350140/?__xts__[0]=68.ARA02RLJQPICPyZwN8f3pCOzSsMHH-CcAjoOiXDxNT-pH32heKB5CulnqCWd2n_mPuIzbGMvCaK6nBg52ATXcjeBPYpYYOiMRQWNFj-1LThs0hRh5PhjDS5k2GFXjKgwSPbRetOyHJOkk-ePiS6IRd_dZr_0FpiqfB-f0jgbKmETUd_tgenYMKE-9XDA1j1qn5Vb6nCJEfez0umtncWBgQKPAav39noR0obWgxZrSXaMPxHszwbFRXlkAIJkXJthZYM3-_ov5An1Wf8H8JkCj7CAiAnrtWZSpQkYHk-DsDSqhSBEDbPjPP8nzQ6yVgi9dhTykrINyBdavXJJgjfOvxiSIERmNw&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=a14ef40099&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I was talking to the El Paso food bank CEO Susan Goodell this morning.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
I was talking to the El Paso food bank CEO Susan Goodell this morning. She
told me about an experience she’d had at a Walgreens earlier this week.

“The cashier asked me why I was buying so much sunscreen. I explained that
it was for our volunteers who are out in the sun distributing groceries at
the food bank. And she said, ‘You mean, there’s a place you can go to for
food?’”

It turns out that the cashier is the only one in her family of seven who
has a job, and on that one meager income (a starting cashier makes $10/hr)
is unable to make ends meet.

Just think about it. This Walgreens cashier — putting herself at risk by
going to work every day so that the rest of us can buy groceries,
medicines and household needs — is unable to feed herself and her family.

She’s not alone. In the midst of record layoffs and an historic economic
contraction, more people have filed for unemployment in Texas in the last
four weeks than in all of 2019. People are out of work, and instead of two
bread-winners in the household, there is now only one.

Or none.

Thankfully we have food banks serving each one of the 254 counties in
Texas, where people like the Walgreens cashier can get a week’s worth of
groceries for their family.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42444?refcode=ema20200417-85791&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=85791%2E444211%2E3nx5g5 ]These food banks are dependent on all of us, both for volunteer labor
to pack and distribute the food and for donations to purchase the food in
the first place. Can you make a donation of $3 today to a
Texas food bank?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42444?refcode=ema20200417-85791&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=85791%2E444211%2E3nx5g5 ]Contribute $3

It’s important to understand that the need is there. But so is the ability
to help.

When Amy and I showed up for our volunteer shift at the El Paso food bank
yesterday we were struck by just how big the operation has grown in the
last couple of weeks. Dozens of volunteers, dozens of National Guard,
dozens of paid “Get Shift Done” workers (food service employees who’ve
recently been laid off).

After having our temperature taken, going through safety instruction that
reminded us to always wear gloves and a mask and keep more than six-foot
distance from other volunteers, we were led to the warehouse where we met
our volunteer supervisor.

Dave is retired military. Tough and a little gruff, but full of
concentrated, efficient energy and very precise direction. He was the
leader our volunteer unit needed. At first he had us sort pallets of
donated items into distinct categories so that they could be prepared for
distribution. All dairy over here. Blackberries, blueberries, raspberries
on that pallet. Chips, chocolate, and snacks over there. Frozen foods and
meat right here.

“Ever used one of these?” he asked as he brought over a pallet jack. I had
when I worked in a grocery store in college, but it had been a while. As I
struggled to move the newly built pallet of vegetables over to another
part of the warehouse a young man named Chris came over and helped me.
“Looks like the pallet is damaged, we’re going to have to move the jack
out a little and then push this together.”

He reset the jack and got it moving in the right direction while Dave and
I pushed on either side. I asked Chris what he did for a living.

“I work at a Sam’s Club stocking shelves.”

“And so on your day off you come down to the food bank and do the same
thing for free?”

“Yep!”

When we finished sorting, we took our places on an assembly line, six feet
apart from one another. A box would cruise down the line on rollers, and
at each station food items would be deposited. My station started with
tomatoes (5 large tomatoes per box), then when those ran out, jalapeño
peppers (a handful). Then bell peppers and eggplant (one per box). And
lastly potatoes (four). Amy was in charge of onions, tomatillos, and sweet
potatoes.

I later learned that while it’s great to have so much fresh produce,
dairy, and meat, it masks a real challenge for the food bank: they are
struggling to afford non-perishable items like rice and beans. That means
they have a logistical problem of getting this stuff shipped, organized,
sorted and distributed before it spoils AND they are still not able to get
as much of the non-perishables that are a fundamental part of our diet and
our food security.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42444?refcode=ema20200417-85791&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=85791%2E444211%2E3nx5g5 ]Can you help Texas food banks buy needed non-perishables? They're
struggling to afford items like rice and beans that are easier to
distribute and are fundamental to food security.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42444?refcode=ema20200417-85791&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=85791%2E444211%2E3nx5g5 ]Contribute

One of the great things about volunteering at the food bank is you end up
meeting people you might not otherwise get to know.

When we started on the assembly line the first person we met was Alex,
who, when I asked how he heard about the volunteer opportunity said “one
of your Powered by People phone bankers called my wife yesterday and asked
her if she could volunteer. She said ‘yes’ and then turned around and told
me to be here by 8am!”

He gave me a kind of “thanks, pal!” look afterwards. But I could tell he
was into it. He kept working on engineering solutions to our chueco
rolling track to keep the boxes from getting stuck as they rolled down the
line.

Dione, who told me she was named after the mother of Aphrodite, was let go
from a bar on Cincinnati street when they had to close down. She now works
with Get Shift Done, which pays her for her time at the food bank.

Andrea, from Canutillo, is a mother of two. She’s also a nurse and was
just let go from her job. Everything is focused on coronavirus, and no one
is scheduling surgeries or other procedures. “They just don’t need me
right now.” So she’s spending her time volunteering at the food bank.

Sergeant Elizondo was deployed to the food bank with his National Guard
unit. He’s a graduate of Ysleta High. Prior to the pandemic his job had
him traveling throughout Texas, Oklahoma and beyond. But now he’s focused
on helping at the food bank in El Paso.

As our shift was coming to a close and we were getting ready to leave, a
guy named David Montes came up and introduced himself. He told me that he
is a boxer and had a title fight scheduled at the Don Haskins center in El
Paso before the pandemic hit. The fight’s been cancelled, and he doesn’t
know when he’ll be able to box professionally again. “But now I’m doing my
part until this is over!”

Dave, Chris, Alex, Dione, Andrea, Sgt. Elizondo, and David... and everyone
else out there... made me so proud of this town, so grateful for everyone
who is volunteering to get the food out, and everyone who is donating to
make sure there is food to distribute.

Amy and I are going to continue to volunteer and donate and support those
who need the help and those who are providing the help.

I hope you’ll join us,

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42444?refcode=ema20200417-85791&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1041&akid=85791%2E444211%2E3nx5g5 ]Contribute $3

clean_body: I was talking to the El Paso food bank CEO Susan Goodell this morning. She told me about an experience she’d had at a Walgreens earlier this week. “The cashier asked me why I was buying so much sunscreen. I explained that it was for our volunteers who are out in the sun distributing groceries at the food bank. And she said, ‘You mean, there’s a place you can go to for food?’” It turns out that the cashier is the only one in her family of seven who has a job, and on that one meager income (a starting cashier makes $10/hr) is unable to make ends meet. Just think about it. This Walgreens cashier — putting herself at risk by going to work every day so that the rest of us can buy groceries, medicines and household needs — is unable to feed herself and her family. She’s not alone. In the midst of record layoffs and an historic economic contraction, more people have filed for unemployment in Texas in the last four weeks than in all of 2019. People are out of work, and instead of two bread-winners in the household, there is now only one. Or none. Thankfully we have food banks serving each one of the 254 counties in Texas, where people like the Walgreens cashier can get a week’s worth of groceries for their family. [ ]These food banks are dependent on all of us, both for volunteer labor to pack and distribute the food and for donations to purchase the food in the first place. Can you make a donation of $3 today to a Texas food bank? [ ]Contribute $3 It’s important to understand that the need is there. But so is the ability to help. When Amy and I showed up for our volunteer shift at the El Paso food bank yesterday we were struck by just how big the operation has grown in the last couple of weeks. Dozens of volunteers, dozens of National Guard, dozens of paid “Get Shift Done” workers (food service employees who’ve recently been laid off). After having our temperature taken, going through safety instruction that reminded us to always wear gloves and a mask and keep more than six-foot distance from other volunteers, we were led to the warehouse where we met our volunteer supervisor. Dave is retired military. Tough and a little gruff, but full of concentrated, efficient energy and very precise direction. He was the leader our volunteer unit needed. At first he had us sort pallets of donated items into distinct categories so that they could be prepared for distribution. All dairy over here. Blackberries, blueberries, raspberries on that pallet. Chips, chocolate, and snacks over there. Frozen foods and meat right here. “Ever used one of these?” he asked as he brought over a pallet jack. I had when I worked in a grocery store in college, but it had been a while. As I struggled to move the newly built pallet of vegetables over to another part of the warehouse a young man named Chris came over and helped me. “Looks like the pallet is damaged, we’re going to have to move the jack out a little and then push this together.” He reset the jack and got it moving in the right direction while Dave and I pushed on either side. I asked Chris what he did for a living. “I work at a Sam’s Club stocking shelves.” “And so on your day off you come down to the food bank and do the same thing for free?” “Yep!” When we finished sorting, we took our places on an assembly line, six feet apart from one another. A box would cruise down the line on rollers, and at each station food items would be deposited. name: Kathy Manning
subject: What are you doing to lift your spirits?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
This is what I've been doing at home ->
|
---

| | Right now, we all could use more light-hearted moments to get us through this challenging time. Recently, I caught up with friends on a video chat and shared a prayer for our frontline workers, first responders, and teachers. I've also been spending some of our time at home baking and even attended a virtual wedding and a virtual baby naming! Rather than lament the fact that we can't be together for these important life cycle events, we have learned to celebrate the fact that so many of us were able to join in on these wonderful family celebrations from across the country. |
---
---
Whether it's reconnecting with loved ones who you haven't been able to see, giving back to your community, or taking up new hobbies, we should all do small things to lift our spirits.
**What have you been doing at home to keep spirits up? Reply to this email and let me know!**
I look forward to reading your responses,
Kathy

---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| Friend, My name is Jerid, and I'm the manager for Reverend Warnock's Senate campaign. In a minute, I'm going to ask you to pitch in before tomorrow's midnight deadline - but first, let me tell you why this matters: **Everyone from Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight to _The Washington Post_ says that Senate control is up for grabs - and that it hinges on what happens here in Georgia.** This is important: Losing in Georgia means at least _two more years_ of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington - rolling back critical progress on health care, voting rights and climate change. **And you know what the worst part is? Our GOP opponent Kelly Loeffler has McConnell 's _full backing_ , and she's already started spending $20 _million_ of her own fortune to buy this seat and solidify McConnell's iron grip on Senate control.** With everything at stake, polling shows us locked in a _tie_ with Loeffler, putting us in serious danger of losing our chance to flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate. name: Team Warner
subject: Re: Trump's tweet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Instead of doing his job and listening to health professionals, President Trump is sending inflammatory tweets.
|
---
| | Derek --

We are facing a global pandemic. Across the country, people are in need of COVID-19 tests. Health care providers are desperate for protective equipment.

What is our president doing about it? **Tweeting.** Attacking the recent passage of common-sense gun reform in Virginia, like universal background checks.
| [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e9/53d9897e/54cee6e1/1c886530/3804284584/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-leadership?refcode=20200417_f_1_nd__547__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---

Instead of doing his job and listening to health professionals, President Trump is sending inflammatory tweets.

In 2019, Virginians elected Democratic majorities to both chambers of the General Assembly. Since then, our leaders in the General Assembly passed the Equal Rights Amendment, increased ballot access through vote-by-mail and early voting initiatives, and passed universal background checks to keep all Virginians safe.

We need our leaders to be doing more than tweeting -- we need them to be making real changes that keep us safer. That's why it's so important that we re-elect Mark Warner, take back the U.S. Senate, and build a campaign that helps Virginia win in races from the White House on down to local offices.

**[If you can, please consider contributing to Mark's re-election campaign to make sure we keep responsible leaders in Washington fighting for us.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e9/53d9897e/54cee6e1/1c88653f/3804284584/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-leadership?refcode=20200417_f_1_nd__547__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Please pitch in only if you can afford to do so -- we know that this is a hard time for many. We're so grateful for your support, whether you're able to chip in today or not.

We're going to get through this difficult time together. Stay safe and healthy.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e9/53d9897e/54cee6e1/1c88653e/3804284584/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU0NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-leadership?refcode=20200417_f_1_nd__547__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4e9/53d9897e/54cee6e1/1c88653d/3804284584/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

body:

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Just got an update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Taylor told me we are so close to our goal.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890351/7f51f7bc/4f65d565/4ef118da/3869134341/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, I just got an email from our Texas Finance Director, Taylor, and she told me that we are SO CLOSE to reaching our $25,000 Mid-Month Goal! This is all due to our grassroots team stepping up, and I'm especially grateful because I know it isn't easy for everyone to give right now.

**[If you're in a position to give (even just a little bit), please pitch in before midnight to help us reach this goal.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890351/7f51f7bc/4f65d565/4ef118d9/3869134341/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200417.3nd__1246__&amount=10")**

Thanks x1,000,000!

\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890351/7f51f7bc/4f65d565/4ef118d9/3869134341/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-aprilmm?refcode=email_20200417.3nd__1246__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890351/7f51f7bc/4f65d565/4ef118d8/3869134341/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1246&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890351/7f51f7bc/4f65d565/4ef118df/3869134341/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Alex, Team Scheller
