body:
It’s Alex here, Lisa’s campaign manager. I was just tallying up Lisa’s Emergency Primary Fund donations, and fname, I’m scared to report that we...... Peter, it’s Alex here, Lisa’s campaign manager.
I was just tallying up Lisa’s Emergency Primary Fund donations, and Peter, I’m scared to report that we are still falling behind.
Our deadline is tonight at 11:59 pm ET, and at this moment, we are still over $4,000 off.
But Peter, I haven’t given up hope yet.
Pennsylvanians are tough – that includes you.
I know you don’t want to watch Lehigh Valley, our home and the place that we love, be overrun by far-left politics and self-interest. I think we are all ready for some change and a conservative voice in DC who will fight for us and defend us.
**[Will you please chip in IMMEDIATELY and help us meet our goal?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=588261a5446641278855bdfb0250533a&_e=vCA8aJUbDsjYQmeL-Zux2RmDMc8nMeyOeXuLMdEIUDFBUZaizAUNbZntvV4t1FgGDBkh0X_BgS6861oSyaiefJ9RfbV7amUtUSQYyOl96IZHPB0nEdMBjILyGYVHvGp1rmg1u5w1nSDFmE6FK8AEOt8v6iw9H_l5cRC1YDaJcuRSI7ZkDaPZqyiIKMK3NNU2Amzr2xe2zdgHW_HGkktZyUx1VYNmcvuxTbi7qVya7Wq1HcSrz_b7Xyb7IO6wGzSeEXzJoxjpC71PKl8qaSw74iTC0EaEQuSQn_fzzB9SDCguDXTk8M-cPY2pNbyIjmT8T9pTtVji13AfQE0eNT24zUiBqvqqFrc05HeM7VuhxFNqsDTswKcblJnjrEF6KJOXoRA2u9tIpHdSO8YBShSwslN0A9OZg_dj9GecCQF3ScFhV6RbnaFnqEuKqt74H8tvhZlK5dN-_saKK-AQ_Vo8sQ%3D%3D)** **Emergency Primary Fund** Goal: $4,550 [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=588261a5446641278855bdfb0250533a&_e=vCA8aJUbDsjYQmeL-Zux2RmDMc8nMeyOeXuLMdEIUDFBUZaizAUNbZntvV4t1FgGDBkh0X_BgS6861oSyaiefJ9RfbV7amUtUSQYyOl96IZHPB0nEdMBjILyGYVHvGp1rmg1u5w1nSDFmE6FK8AEOt8v6iw9H_l5cRC1YDaJcuRSI7ZkDaPZqyiIKMK3NNU2Amzr2xe2zdgHW_HGkktZyUx1VYNmcvuxTbi7qVya7WrlBXPpLIsppDUKLYgaAJaz7GTCciAnU30_fSpexlehRihRT-rhsTqFLLzZg-jtN_TZUvvZV0izPTVZeUuVSRh-eXxgEnzntw5eZR0PcFVebNkFbexRsvdPr7PYiTTNSs4dAgiXAlcEuqyG7fAmafCWUIp8slfiG8j_YTgUS4gJ0Pu072RoCf7iRi7yMW3jJ_O5lqekygsqvM-vihHWT7RBgjOJK2vznE2ystkB86duIA%3D%3D): **Not Participated Yet** Thanks, Peter.
Alex Campaign Manager, Lisa Scheller for Congress \--------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, Since I first reached out two days ago filling you in on what my campaign is currently facing, my team and I have been blown away by the response of people from all over our district who refuse to let a far-left Democrat control this seat.
I’ve heard far and wide about how passionate you are about protecting our constitutional rights including our freedoms of speech, the second amendment, and more.
I’m committed to ensuring that our conservative values are represented in DC once I am elected in November.
But Peter, before we can look to our general election, we must make it through our primary election that was just postponed.
[**We are picking up lost ground, and we only have $12,023 to go to meet our Emergency Primary Fund deadline.**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=588261a5446641278855bdfb0250533a&_e=vCA8aJUbDsjYQmeL-Zux2RmDMc8nMeyOeXuLMdEIUDFBUZaizAUNbZntvV4t1FgGDBkh0X_BgS6861oSyaiefJ9RfbV7amUtUSQYyOl96IZHPB0nEdMBjILyGYVHvGp1rmg1u5w1nSDFmE6FK8AEOt8v6iw9H_l5cRC1YDaJcuRSI7ZkDaPZqyiIKMK3NNU2Amzr2xe2zdgHW_HGkktZyUx1VYNmcvuxTbi7qVya7Wpn_ofTOaeMjtZL5WIS93q9AWK6QzbROgKhSsidfhhALn0Pqokd1Cm44nC9jvMs9l19bsWRulYKdtXt3Y8DmPiMlyfYe6-g_ggD3_ad-2OXsHK4ipEZobAixqo2_EgIOmlTtiZgvGDjgk4PqXt3HqnMf3xWXUOg0t9olsgsG9M0FyStK8S1KQST0Qo2uSW4Qyi1WCUFCu8WsB_pFMExNT2sI9rLj-HW9Tq9-S3c8KeF_g%3D%3D) **Emergency Primary Fund** Goal: $12,023 [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=588261a5446641278855bdfb0250533a&_e=vCA8aJUbDsjYQmeL-Zux2RmDMc8nMeyOeXuLMdEIUDFBUZaizAUNbZntvV4t1FgGDBkh0X_BgS6861oSyaiefJ9RfbV7amUtUSQYyOl96IZHPB0nEdMBjILyGYVHvGp1rmg1u5w1nSDFmE6FK8AEOt8v6iw9H_l5cRC1YDaJcuRSI7ZkDaPZqyiIKMK3NNU2Amzr2xe2zdgHW_HGkktZyUx1VYNmcvuxTbi7qVya7Wo1I6KMpsPhMYeeJJDj5E38VWZFSVpHBygBkYIz5Ll-QQFXsXtWCQfJ_duPRULbvzVlkpG4PLhD6-Af0OFxjLfsMG-R7JaE8sUty0IcgI8qEqi3YwCtAL7AIXaJyUmLJk75JSIdOblJZ3q5CVqpzcgpU5pCPnmUmbK387JYXCLjnhD14WgjerVD9A9gS5H1iEQyVyy7SZyt4PCQnpNbCGtD2LL7tx7HwM9nlsozZQLh8A%3D%3D): **Not Participated Yet** **[Time is running out, so please do not delay. Anything right now helps, whether that is $10, $50, or $500. A little can go a long way, so please don’t second guess your gift.](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=588261a5446641278855bdfb0250533a&_e=vCA8aJUbDsjYQmeL-Zux2RmDMc8nMeyOeXuLMdEIUDFBUZaizAUNbZntvV4t1FgGDBkh0X_BgS6861oSyaiefJ9RfbV7amUtUSQYyOl96IZHPB0nEdMBjILyGYVHvGp1rmg1u5w1nSDFmE6FK8AEOt8v6iw9H_l5cRC1YDaJcuRSI7ZkDaPZqyiIKMK3NNU2Amzr2xe2zdgHW_HGkktZyUx1VYNmcvuxTbi7qVya7WoYkKp3t_SxGeOjvGFi6BooHIAkLzRjxIDxVgkRFFoLLK_VvwTHIqqDKmgEl3cBBUGjDM5fEvwV4PoiVpZyM1PbYM6r9DG2SIv0zjJprquVk6NdIrOdLTz_SnhaKx19FIwWauutdiI6YAdkbHj_yq7coJ29cDcvaqhyQnyaoK1tvubOvcP_5q1P0GRghQH32kW0XcaRrEc6JDq1FuaIXXz-EOOMMkgLJ2Jagf48egjzTQ%3D%3D) **
Thanks, Peter.

Alex Campaign Manager, Lisa Scheller for Congress \--------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, Since I first reached out two days ago filling you in on what my campaign is currently facing, my team and I have been blown away by the response of people from all over our district who refuse to let a far-left Democrat control this seat. I’ve heard far and wide about how passionate you are about protecting our constitutional rights including our freedoms of speech, the second amendment, and more. I’m committed to ensuring that our conservative values are represented in DC once I am elected in November. But Peter, before we can look to our general election, we must make it through our primary election that was just postponed. Emergency Primary Fund Goal: $12,023 : Not Participated Yet Thanks, Peter. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Support our community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Our city, our state and our country is going through a challenge. There is no doubt that we need better representation in Washington who will support our small businesses, fight for our energy jobs and hold the authoritarian Chinese government accountable for their role in this crisis.

But today, I'm asking you to help me support a much more urgent and dire cause.

The charitable organizations that so many in our community are relying on during the Coronavirus are having their resources stretched to the limits. With our economy facing unknown challenges, donations are being asked to go further than ever.

If you have the resources, please consider contributing to one of the many organizations helping our community. A few of the organizations include:

[Houston Food Bank](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=4aeb385312e74c3c9234423cd3690b50&_e=1sbpPSMjfOg-zg3crIZPvE1DNPg-RUliJIeEe4hqdnfi8pezu7BlRAf2uyE-frXaHD1yns5ghOcPj0tWk0zPII9AwGa66hcY0eL_Ha4pbLvMzha-ZY5sdoGGm3ciH7MIlpBrPuEIrtEWjeiREz4TFuLNJ_3dztA673hWNHLQGfLbTuySnuO_gw7Wws1M_8Iw5XKO2zDpK6VMtR2MGn5eJLEU9r426zhSDC8TiZ_rMFfd8NSig7Bf2bvApU2e5WTl3ipii1b1vnMGJLkYKpdFMb5uW6Y0EulTcu-zeOUqELshKIC0UlXLWR1XAvTYO5Ht0OzPjyvr76Jmmy7JrZQ0JukXPBrqv7AJCBPP8AKu3aAMTBioCxUmiqT28BwGwQl4cvtCpRyFbtfUGf-WtnRuF-rd5IfZ69dt0y4pXjKeQyF2WqP_yPjxiJzrBzOUmPb6)

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Hunker Down Hoosiers to May 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Governor Holcomb is working day and night with health officials, studying the data, and letting facts on the ground determine appropriate next steps. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=48a8dcb0418c46d1b2ef9aa2a0130ae0&_e=Z6GsyUIrzX6H-y5zxLgbIUYWKZ0lFIa5RKeeR4F3u-T9x_NySbuxAQwDykSj0jG6KA2ktkItYpo5D2exN1GZOOADGMA4YufNnIXbH3oBy4NFyhvhohCXfVm-WQ8WF2xT_bL4zpWJPlsqQjPe8J-YCsn3OhpW8_sel6rCDu-n1XhSj86cTw_XeTybXRZxUA8cFp6nWJyg2Xm_MuNoV1VLfFNEbMvw2Vm5JR8nDhBolgmy7ewhQz_02Dm7YaH1FCIBkGoonmvwvthHT_npZx9Y7x8KXXqKyk-ig6lGhtK-hfsM1tn0gtXRQU73WE6sJN3eanx2A1YE0rqYPuOXCyy05YlhYQstwbAs0VVKf9htqZHwPfnyp7-ErVpoPa1crhtiIIF-asS1jOVgAGmlOUJYVHN36614mBfjwUcVo_q35ZZQTFCXTO0QjJavalM6pjMuPXOOM1WgG435pYd6EYmx0w%3D%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

Today Governor Holcomb announced that planning is underway for a safe — _**and phased-in**_ —reopening of Indiana’s economy. This planning includes a short extension of the Hunker Down Hoosiers executive order. _**The stay-at-home order is extended to May 1.**_

Governor Holcomb is working day and night with health officials, studying the data, and letting _**facts on the ground** _determine appropriate next steps. And he’s asked industry leaders and associations for recommendations on changes we can make that will allow us to return to work safely.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=48a8dcb0418c46d1b2ef9aa2a0130ae0&_e=Z6GsyUIrzX6H-y5zxLgbIUYWKZ0lFIa5RKeeR4F3u-T9x_NySbuxAQwDykSj0jG6KA2ktkItYpo5D2exN1GZOOADGMA4YufNnIXbH3oBy4NFyhvhohCXfVm-WQ8WF2xT_bL4zpWJPlsqQjPe8J-YCsn3OhpW8_sel6rCDu-n1XhSj86cTw_XeTybXRZxUA8cFp6nWJyg2Xm_MuNoV1VLfFNEbMvw2Vm5JR8nDhBolgmy7ewhQz_02Dm7YaH1FCIB77TWv6EC4fhf2p4OXfs-OY7B79BjEskIs8O_oBxgrXRboNZfipW0wFa-ZcWLH1B3EIWUcpuo-L21QwfPNG19sY3w-zGXemfe8Ghg38cu91tXp3-xlMpJL8JkeW1tXwkVmjZnTK8x0XzvgN9lrVo3AERWuK4us_16P1epGqjoqB_Z-8vzGXek1SwPGBCiZUfyBjY_tj_j_mJTLYsX6pqgeQ%3D%3D)
**WATCH: Governor Holcomb preparing for Indiana's re-opening**
We can see the _**light at the end of the tunnel,**_ and preparations are starting to be made to reopen our state.

The health and safety of Hoosiers is Governor Holcomb’s highest priority and will guide his decisions as he continues to lead Indiana during this global pandemic.

This is still a critical time. Staying hunkered down is working. The curve is flattening. We can see the positive results of your actions.

What you’ve done these last several weeks has undoubtedly slowed the spread, flattened the curve, and saved lives.

#INThisTogether
-Your Holcomb Crew
---

name: Tom Steyer
subject: This COVID-19 recession
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Friend,

We can’t control our president’s pathological lack of empathy and inability to lead — but we can control how we recover from the worst economic recession since the Great Depression.

I’m writing to let you know that starting today, I’ll be leading California Governor Gavin Newsom’s Business and Jobs Recovery Task Force — [_**and I want your input as we get going**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZgtEWFVxoUaG7cQrRAp6kOu4zrM5jiE-2FtxXyXgPz9qSuwA3ig-2Bu7lmwb-2FSuKPbsM9g6RIisLRIUq9eKflBQYgtLq1q5fjq9lQjukfXjrXhpEWT6u7P-2B7SjeiYAZTfP-2FseMd-2Bvm-2BxG6MOrISlVfjnWfql4pGFwgZP2gkFsoFaZewv0KAHiyr9xNeCQl82e4wIU7x-2BItVmBdZdTIw1USQ9Zc7j6tS-2B6lYZf9qei5Yvc7kB7S6JfI6M6-2F30oSZoPDTNpg-3D-3DAS0n_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZw2DaJ5Z32m4PDchuKXffkUuW1h7LKKdrpCYyTo4HF-2FRyKuIm3wcBzPiWlBIyXKbgSzNTse0r6D3ny6iOCjJ4iHl-2B4qvKXoFW1BfBVNTWBu7gzKsEellO-2BwIDW0oLxFy-2B5O8wtWV0z0RHK3xhswzB7MQX-2FymWFmGyGyVxRh1zaGgMd-2ByuBzK1T8LwSxav7rEwBt1WSqcB-2FAW2FuR2N8FNGfZvV5uRkypIZ4yU2jFo4bVYRSRYBFV4RsIXqNUMe-2F9xD6pleCfrr64xFR8-2FykkgYqolLnz6RmjXSuabzrfh5wRN2Rgeo1huxYObvXpivOS-2B-2B7ZAEoOf0MQIhQRy0wcXBHBVTfsAx-2Bf21sMB5Ewpf8CL2Pi-2BjdQmWeexG8zgMktOym9DJSJ9WxuXTk8dYvas1aVihp3PzrcPMDxBYBsrYz-2FuHfv-2FAdtFqaSJmPqBkpapmpye5G2osPLEvUzdQ-2FJUgIiF0rlbn0lucEhdfDVipD4s-2FfmBXF45DSDSNFWb5b-2ByCcN1-2FT-2BTg2TZKJW-2BWqhBjJuJliVCKK4j-2FLKKKJCf-2BhjIWNAA4qF04ddlSaQWc0WvUtY5f0nKimTXmaJuAZVNkrVj-2BhR3NM1UpI-2FT-2FObnqhEvD2z5B1K3nBndQ3mLuayJO6ISC-2BWLuOAbLd-2FrbxcKs-2BkQaFlOxuV2Of1RIuCBzzTo-3D).

Even if you don’t live in California, your input is valuable to me. **My job in the coming weeks and months is to write a fair, green, people-centered economic strategy to help California recover from the COVID-19 induced recession — one that can be a model for the rest of the country.
**
We will center on the communities hit hardest — working families, communities of color, the unhoused, and low-income communities — to ensure an equitable and just recovery, be as transparent and inclusive as possible, and most importantly, prioritize everyone’s health and safety. This is non-negotiable. What we’re _not_ going to do is go back to business as usual: The “old way” — where lobbyists write the recovery rules — is over.

[_**Friend, if you are comfortable sharing, I want to know: How has this recession affected you or your family’s income, job, business, or livelihood?**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/ls/click?upn=2PbTaIH-2Bu1BICxGw6BOoZgtEWFVxoUaG7cQrRAp6kOu4zrM5jiE-2FtxXyXgPz9qSuwA3ig-2Bu7lmwb-2FSuKPbsM9g6RIisLRIUq9eKflBQYgtLq1q5fjq9lQjukfXjrXhpEWT6u7P-2B7SjeiYAZTfP-2FseMd-2Bvm-2BxG6MOrISlVfjnWfql4pGFwgZP2gkFsoFaZewv0KAHiyr9xNeCQl82e4wIU7x-2BItVmBdZdTIw1USQ9Zc7j6tS-2B6lYZf9qei5Yvc7kB7S6JfI6M6-2F30oSZoPDTNpg-3D-3Df-99_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymj-2F7ZKPx3NVKw8kjoD6Gq3c-2BrItP5taLUBrsAr-2FjZetFIJTu2XOSYWw-2BRTsCZVEZUmXdgh-2BenInj6gTOMryUZZw2DaJ5Z32m4PDchuKXffkUuW1h7LKKdrpCYyTo4HF-2FRyKuIm3wcBzPiWlBIyXKbgSzNTse0r6D3ny6iOCjJ4iHl-2B4qvKXoFW1BfBVNTWBu7gzKsEellO-2BwIDW0oLxFy-2B5O8wtWV0z0RHK3xhswzB7MQX-2FymWFmGyGyVxRh1zaGgMd-2ByuBzK1T8LwSxav7rEwBt1WSqcB-2FAW2FuR2N8FNGfZvV5uRkypIZ4yU2jFo4bVYRSRYBFV4RsIXqNUMe-2F9xD6pleCfrr64xFR8-2FykkgYqolLnz6RmjXSuabzrfh5wRN2Rgeo1huxYObvXpivOS-2B-2B7ZAEoOf0MQIhQRy0wcXBHBVTfsAx-2Bf21sMB5Ewpf8CL2Pi-2BjdQmWeexG8zgMktOym9DJSJ9WxuXTk8dYvas1aVihp3PzrcPMDxBYBsrYz-2FuHfv-2FAdtFqaSJmPqBkpapmpye5G2osPLEvUzdQ-2FJUgIiF0rlbn0lucEhdfDVipD4s-2FfmBXF45DSDSNFWb5b-2ByCSU8aYSOA3O46p4P1FRxzJlKnyyxvVBIBAebts2vwb4UIuA-2FMd3VQufTiQvKkG7ris0tOJFlHqHXGlZhGNGFuL9SZDmciQ5gG5tGJ1fL4BkdX5Ns5Q6vT5Ax8zVv-2Fqh8zBKVSNAyL-2B-2FVMhqxBvspoSj-2BPQmimTmFVJ7jvRuTmmPg-3D)

Your answers will be part of our solution, and I may follow up with you individually to learn more.

A forward-thinking government does what’s right by its people, the climate, and communities who normally get left out of the conversation. That’s our plan for this economic recovery, too.

Thanks in advance for your input and story. We’ll get through this together.
More to come,

clean_body: | | | | Friend, We can’t control our president’s pathological lack of empathy and inability to lead — but we can control how we recover from the worst economic recession since the Great Depression. I’m writing to let you know that starting today, I’ll be leading California Governor Gavin Newsom’s Business and Jobs Recovery Task Force — . Even if you don’t live in California, your input is valuable to me. My job in the coming weeks and months is to write a fair, green, people-centered economic strategy to help California recover from the COVID-19 induced recession — one that can be a model for the rest of the country. We will center on the communities hit hardest — working families, communities of color, the unhoused, and low-income communities — to ensure an equitable and just recovery, be as transparent and inclusive as possible, and most importantly, prioritize everyone’s health and safety. This is non-negotiable. What we’re not going to do is go back to business as usual: The “old way” — where lobbyists write the recovery rules — is over. Your answers will be part of our solution, and I may follow up with you individually to learn more. A forward-thinking government does what’s right by its people, the climate, and communities who normally get left out of the conversation. That’s our plan for this economic recovery, too. Thanks in advance for your input and story. We’ll get through this together. More to come, Tom | | | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Please visit for information and resources to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and prevent infection. Follow CDC guidelines, including social distancing to avoid large groups and unnecessary contact with others, and adhere to instruction from your local and state elected officials. We want to make sure you're receiving relevant information about how you can help us do what's right. If you’d rather not receive any emails from us, you can unsubscribe by clicking — we'll be sad to see you go! Tom Steyer 2020 · PO Box 626 · San Francisco, CA 94104 · USA [PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
